statusBar = document.getElementById('status-bar');\n81\t        if (!statusBar) {\n82\t            console.warn('[Replay] Status bar not found');\n83\t            return;\n84\t        }\n85\t\n86\t        // Create replay control bar (hidden by default)\n87\t        const replayBar = document.createElement('div');\n88\t        replayBar.id = 'replay-control-bar';\n89\t        replayBar.className = 'replay-control-bar';\n90\t        replayBar.style.display = 'none';\n91\t\n92\t        replayBar.innerHTML = `\n93\t            <div class=\"replay-controls\">\n94\t                <button id=\"replay-back-btn\" class=\"replay-btn\" title=\"Back to live\">\n95\t                    <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n96\t                        <path d=\"M1 4v6h6\"/>\n97\t                        <path d=\"M3.51 15a9 9 0 1 0 2.13-9.36L23 10M10 19l-7-7\"/>\n98\t                    </svg>\n99\t                </button>\n100\t\n101\t                <div class=\"replay-info\">\n102\t                    <span id=\"replay-timestamp\" class=\"replay-timestamp\">--:--:--</span>\n103\t                    <span id=\"replay-range\" class=\"replay-range\">0:00 / 0:00</span>\n104\t                </div>\n105\t\n106\t                <div class=\"replay-playback\">\n107\t                    <button id=\"replay-play-btn\" class=\"replay-btn\" title=\"Play/Pause\">\n108\t                        <svg id=\"play-icon\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n109\t                            <path d=\"M8 5v14l11-7z\"/>\n110\t                        </svg>\n111\t                        <svg id=\"pause-icon\" style=\"display:none\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n112\t                            <path d=\"M6 19h4V5H6v14zm8-14v14h4V5h-4z\"/>\n113\t                        </svg>\n114\t                    </button>\n115\t\n116\t                    <select id=\"replay-speed\" class=\"replay-speed\">\n117\t                        <option value=\"1\">1×</option>\n118\t                        <option value=\"2\">2×</option>\n119\t                        <option value=\"5\">5×</option>\n120\t                    </select>\n121\t                </div>\n122\t\n123\t                <div class=\"replay-timeline\">\n124\t                    <input type=\"range\" id=\"replay-scrubber\" class=\"replay-scrubber\"\n125\t                           min=\"0\" max=\"100\" step=\"0.1\" value=\"0\"\n126\t                           title=\"Scrub through timeline\">\n127\t                    <div id=\"replay-event-markers\" class=\"replay-event-markers\"></div>\n128\t                </div>\n129\t\n130\t                <button id=\"replay-close-btn\" class=\"replay-btn\" title=\"Exit replay mode\">\n131\t                    <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n132\t                        <line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/>\n133\t                        <line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/>\n134\t                    </svg>\n135\t                </button>\n136\t            </div>\n137\t\n138\t            <div class=\"replay-tuning\">\n139\t                <button id=\"replay-tune-btn\" class=\"replay-tune-btn\" title=\"Tune detection parameters\">\n140\t                    <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n141\t                        <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"3\"/>\n142\t                        <path d=\"M12 1v6m0 6v6\"/>\n143\t                        <path d=\"m19.07 4.93-1.41 1.41M17 16l-5-5\"/>\n144\t                        <path d=\"M4.93 19.07l1.41-1.41M16 17l5-5\"/>\n145\t                    </svg>\n146\t                    Tune\n147\t                </button>\n148\t            </div>\n149\t        `;\n150\t\n151\t        // Insert after status bar\n152\t        statusBar.parentNode.insertBefore(replayBar, statusBar.nextSibling);\n153\t\n154\t        // Store element references\n155\t        elements = {\n156\t            bar: replayBar,\n157\t            backBtn: document.getElementById('replay-back-btn'),\n158\t            timestamp: document.getElementById('replay-timestamp'),\n159\t            range: document.getElementById('replay-range'),\n160\t            playBtn: document.getElementById('replay-play-btn'),\n161\t            playIcon: document.getElementById('play-icon'),\n162\t            pauseIcon: document.getElementById('pause-icon'),\n163\t            speed: document.getElementById('replay-speed'),\n164\t            scrubber: document.getElementById('replay-scrubber'),\n165\t            closeBtn: document.getElementById('replay-close-btn'),\n166\t            tuneBtn: document.getElementById('replay-tune-btn'),\n167\t        };\n168\t\n169\t        // Attach event listeners\n170\t        elements.backBtn.addEventListener('click', onBackToLive);\n171\t        elements.playBtn.addEventListener('click', onPlayPause);\n172\t        elements.speed.addEventListener('change', onSpeedChange);\n173\t        elements.scrubber.addEventListener('input', onScrub);\n174\t        elements.closeBtn.addEventListener('click', onExitReplay);\n175\t        elements.tuneBtn.addEventListener('click', onTuneParams);\n176\t    }\n177\t\n178\t    // ============================================\n179\t    // API Communication\n180\t    // ============================================\n181\t    function fetchStoreInfo() {\n182\t        fetch('/api/replay/sessions')\n183\t            .then(res => res.json())\n184\t            .then(data => {\n185\t                state.storeOldestMs = data.oldest_timestamp_ms;\n186\t                state.storeNewestMs = data.newest_timestamp_ms;\n187\t                state.storeHasData = data.has_data;\n188\t                console.log('[Replay] Store info:', data);\n189\t            })\n190\t            .catch(err => {\n191\t                console.error('[Replay] Failed to fetch store info:', err);\n192\t            });\n193\t    }\n194\t\n195\t    function startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs) {\n196\t        const fromISO = new Date(fromMs).toISOString();\n197\t        const toISO = toMs ? new Date(toMs).toISOString() : '';\n198\t\n199\t        return fetch('/api/replay/start', {\n200\t            method: 'POST',\n201\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n202\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n203\t                from_iso8601: fromISO,\n204\t                to_iso8601: toISO,\n205\t                speed: 1\n206\t            })\n207\t        })\n208\t        .then(res => {\n209\t            if (!res.ok) {\n210\t                throw new Error('Failed to start replay: ' + res.statusText);\n211\t            }\n212\t            return res.json();\n213\t        })\n214\t        .then(data => {\n215\t            state.activeSessionId = data.session_id;\n216\t            state.sessionFromMs = data.from_ms;\n217\t            state.sessionToMs = data.to_ms;\n218\t            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.from_ms;\n219\t            state.sessionState = 'paused';\n220\t            state.sessionSpeed = data.speed;\n221\t\n222\t            console.log('[Replay] Session started:', data);\n223\t            updateUI();\n224\t            return data.session_id;\n225\t        });\n226\t    }\n227\t\n228\t    function stopReplaySession() {\n229\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n230\t\n231\t        return fetch('/api/replay/stop', {\n232\t            method: 'POST',\n233\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n234\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n235\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId\n236\t            })\n237\t        })\n238\t        .then(res => {\n239\t            if (!res.ok) {\n240\t                throw new Error('Failed to stop replay: ' + res.statusText);\n241\t            }\n242\t            return res.json();\n243\t        })\n244\t        .then(() => {\n245\t            console.log('[Replay] Session stopped:', state.activeSessionId);\n246\t            state.activeSessionId = null;\n247\t            state.isPaused = false;\n248\t            updateUI();\n249\t        });\n250\t    }\n251\t\n252\t    function seekReplay(targetMs) {\n253\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n254\t\n255\t        const targetISO = new Date(targetMs).toISOString();\n256\t\n257\t        return fetch('/api/replay/seek', {\n258\t            method: 'POST',\n259\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n260\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n261\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n262\t                timestamp_iso8601: targetISO\n263\t            })\n264\t        })\n265\t        .then(res => {\n266\t            if (!res.ok) {\n267\t                throw new Error('Failed to seek: ' + res.statusText);\n268\t            }\n269\t            return res.json();\n270\t        })\n271\t        .then(data => {\n272\t            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n273\t            updateUI();\n274\t        });\n275\t    }\n276\t\n277\t    function setPlaybackSpeed(speed) {\n278\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n279\t\n280\t        fetch('/api/replay/set-speed', {\n281\t            method: 'POST',\n282\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n283\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n284\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n285\t                speed: speed\n286\t            })\n287\t        })\n288\t        .then(res => {\n289\t            if (!res.ok) {\n290\t                throw new Error('Failed to set speed: ' + res.statusText);\n291\t            }\n292\t            return res.json();\n293\t        })\n294\t        .then(() => {\n295\t            state.sessionSpeed = speed;\n296\t            console.log('[Replay] Speed set to', speed, 'x');\n297\t        });\n298\t    }\n299\t\n300\t    function setPlaybackState(playbackState) {\n301\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n302\t\n303\t        fetch('/api/replay/set-state', {\n304\t            method: 'POST',\n305\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n306\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n307\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n308\t                state: playbackState\n309\t            })\n310\t        })\n311\t        .then(res => {\n312\t            if (!res.ok) {\n313\t                throw new Error('Failed to set state: ' + res.statusText);\n314\t            }\n315\t            return res.json();\n316\t        })\n317\t        .then(() => {\n318\t            state.sessionState = playbackState;\n319\t            updatePlayPauseButton();\n320\t        });\n321\t    }\n322\t\n323\t    function fetchSessionBlobs(sessionId) {\n324\t        if (!sessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n325\t\n326\t        return fetch('/api/replay/session/' + encodeURIComponent(sessionId))\n327\t            .then(function(res) {\n328\t                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch session state');\n329\t                return res.json();\n330\t            })\n331\t            .then(function(data) {\n332\t                // Feed replay blobs to 3D scene\n333\t                if (data.blobs && data.blobs.length > 0 && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n334\t                    Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n335\t                }\n336\t            })\n337\t            .catch(function(err) {\n338\t                console.warn('[Replay] Failed to fetch session blobs:', err);\n339\t            });\n340\t    }\n341\t\n342\t    function tuneParams(params) {\n343\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n344\t\n345\t        return fetch('/api/replay/tune', {\n346\t            method: 'POST',\n347\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n348\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n349\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n350\t                ...params\n351\t            })\n352\t        })\n353\t        .then(res => {\n354\t            if (!res.ok) {\n355\t                throw new Error('Failed to tune params: ' + res.statusText);\n356\t            }\n357\t            return res.json();\n358\t        })\n359\t        .then(data => {\n360\t            console.log('[Replay] Parameters tuned:', data.params);\n361\t            return data;\n362\t        });\n363\t    }\n364\t\n365\t    // ============================================\n366\t    // Event Handlers\n367\t    // ============================================\n368\t    function onBackToLive() {\n369\t        exitReplayMode();\n370\t    }\n371\t\n372\t    function onPlayPause() {\n373\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n374\t\n375\t        const newState = state.sessionState === 'playing' ? 'paused' : 'playing';\n376\t        setPlaybackState(newState);\n377\t    }\n378\t\n379\t    function onSpeedChange(e) {\n380\t        const speed = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);\n381\t        setPlaybackSpeed(speed);\n382\t    }\n383\t\n384\t    function onScrub(e) {\n385\t        const percent = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n386\t        const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n387\t        const targetMs = state.sessionFromMs + Math.round(rangeMs * percent / 100);\n388\t\n389\t        seekReplay(targetMs);\n390\t    }\n391\t\n392\t    function onExitReplay() {\n393\t        exitReplayMode();\n394\t    }\n395\t\n396\t    function onTuneParams() {\n397\t        showTuningPanel();\n398\t    }\n399\t\n400\t    // ============================================\n401\t    // UI Updates\n402\t    // ============================================\n403\t    function updateUI() {\n404\t        updateTimestampDisplay();\n405\t        updateRangeDisplay();\n406\t        updateScrubber();\n407\t        updatePlayPauseButton();\n408\t    }\n409\t\n410\t    function updateTimestampDisplay() {\n411\t        if (!elements.timestamp) return;\n412\t\n413\t        if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n414\t            elements.timestamp.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionCurrentMs);\n415\t        } else {\n416\t            elements.timestamp.textContent = '--:--:--';\n417\t        }\n418\t    }\n419\t\n420\t    function updateRangeDisplay() {\n421\t        if (!elements.range) return;\n422\t\n423\t        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n424\t            elements.range.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionFromMs) +\n425\t                ' / ' + formatTimestamp(state.sessionToMs);\n426\t        } else {\n427\t            elements.range.textContent = '0:00 / 0:00';\n428\t        }\n429\t    }\n430\t\n431\t    function updateScrubber() {\n432\t        if (!elements.scrubber) return;\n433\t\n434\t        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n435\t            const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n436\t            if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n437\t                const offset = state.sessionCurrentMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n438\t                const percent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (offset / rangeMs) * 100));\n439\t                elements.scrubber.value = percent;\n440\t            }\n441\t        }\n442\t    }\n443\t\n444\t    function updatePlayPauseButton() {\n445\t        if (!elements.playIcon || !elements.pauseIcon) return;\n446\t\n447\t        if (state.sessionState === 'playing') {\n448\t            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'none';\n449\t            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'block';\n450\t        } else {\n451\t            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'block';\n452\t            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'none';\n453\t        }\n454\t    }\n455\t\n456\t    // ============================================\n457\t    // Mode Transitions\n458\t    // ============================================\n459\t    function enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs) {\n460\t        console.log('[Replay] Entering replay mode:', { fromMs, toMs });\n461\t\n462\t        state.isReplayMode = true;\n463\t\n464\t        // Start replay session\n465\t        startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs).then(sessionId => {\n466\t            // Show replay control bar\n467\t            if (elements.bar) {\n468\t                elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n469\t            }\n470\t\n471\t            // Notify 3D visualization to enter replay mode\n472\t            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode) {\n473\t                Viz3D.enterReplayMode();\n474\t            }\n475\t\n476\t            return sessionId;\n477\t        }).catch(err => {\n478\t            console.error('[Replay] Failed to enter replay mode:', err);\n479\t            if (window.SpaxelApp) {\n480\t                SpaxelApp.showToast('Failed to enter replay mode: ' + err.message, 'error');\n481\t            }\n482\t        });\n483\t    }\n484\t\n485\t    function exitReplayMode() {\n486\t        console.log('[Replay] Exiting replay mode');\n487\t\n488\t        // Stop replay session\n489\t        return stopReplaySession().then(() => {\n490\t            state.isReplayMode = false;\n491\t            state.isPaused = false;\n492\t\n493\t            // Hide replay control bar\n494\t            if (elements.bar) {\n495\t                elements.bar.style.display = 'none';\n496\t            }\n497\t\n498\t            // Notify 3D visualization to exit replay mode\n499\t            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.exitReplayMode) {\n500\t                Viz3D.exitReplayMode();\n501\t            }\n502\t\n503\t            // Clear timeline selection and now-replaying chip\n504\t            if (window.SpaxelSidebarTimeline) {\n505\t                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n506\t                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n507\t            }\n508\t\n509\t            // Navigate back to live mode\n510\t            if (window.SpaxelRouter) {\n511\t                SpaxelRouter.navigate('live');\n512\t            }\n513\t        });\n514\t    }\n515\t\n516\t    function pauseLiveMode() {\n517\t        if (state.isPaused) {\n518\t            // Already paused, exit replay mode\n519\t            exitReplayMode();\n520\t            return;\n521\t        }\n522\t\n523\t        console.log('[Replay] Pausing live mode');\n524\t\n525\t        state.isPaused = true;\n526\t\n527\t        // Calculate replay window (default: 60 seconds before now)\n528\t        const now = Date.now();\n529\t        const fromMs = now - (CONFIG.defaultReplayWindowSec * 1000);\n530\t        const toMs = now;\n531\t\n532\t        enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs);\n533\t    }\n534\t\n535\t    // ============================================\n536\t    // Timeline Loop\n537\t    // ============================================\n538\t    let timelineInterval = null;\n539\t\n540\t    function startTimelineLoop() {\n541\t        if (timelineInterval) return;\n542\t\n543\t        timelineInterval = setInterval(() => {\n544\t            if (state.sessionState === 'playing' && state.activeSessionId) {\n545\t                // Fetch current session state\n546\t                fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n547\t                    .then(res => res.json())\n548\t                    .then(data => {\n549\t                        state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n550\t                        updateUI();\n551\t\n552\t                        // Trigger 3D visualization update with replay blobs\n553\t                        if (data.blobs && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n554\t                            Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n555\t                        }\n556\t                    })\n557\t                    .catch(err => {\n558\t                        console.error('[Replay] Failed to fetch session state:', err);\n559\t                    });\n560\t            }\n561\t        }, CONFIG.timelineUpdateInterval);\n562\t    }\n563\t\n564\t    // ============================================\n565\t    // Tuning Panel\n566\t    // ============================================\n567\t    function showTuningPanel() {\n568\t        // Create or show tuning panel overlay\n569\t        let panel = document.getElementById('replay-tuning-panel');\n570\t        if (!panel) {\n571\t            panel = createTuningPanel();\n572\t            document.body.appendChild(panel);\n573\t        }\n574\t\n575\t        panel.style.display = 'flex';\n576\t\n577\t        // Fetch current session params\n578\t        if (state.activeSessionId) {\n579\t            fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n580\t                .then(res => res.json())\n581\t                .then(data => {\n582\t                    populateTuningPanel(data.params || {});\n583\t                });\n584\t        }\n585\t    }\n586\t\n587\t    function createTuningPanel() {\n588\t        const panel = document.createElement('div');\n589\t        panel.id = 'replay-tuning-panel';\n590\t        panel.className = 'replay-tuning-panel';\n591\t\n592\t        panel.innerHTML = `\n593\t            <div class=\"replay-tuning-content\">\n594\t                <div class=\"replay-tuning-header\">\n595\t                    <h2>Detection Parameters</h2>\n596\t                    <button class=\"replay-tuning-close\" onclick=\"this.parentElement.parentElement.parentElement.style.display='none'\">\n597\t                        <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n598\t                            <line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/>\n599\t                            <line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/>\n600\t                        </svg>\n601\t                    </button>\n602\t                </div>\n603\t\n604\t                <div class=\"replay-tuning-body\">\n605\t                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n606\t                        <label>Detection Threshold (deltaRMS)</label>\n607\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-threshold\" min=\"0.001\" max=\"0.1\" step=\"0.001\" value=\"0.02\">\n608\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">0.02</span>\n609\t                    </div>\n610\t\n611\t                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n612\t                        <label>Baseline Time Constant (tau) [seconds]</label>\n613\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-tau\" min=\"1\" max=\"600\" step=\"1\" value=\"30\">\n614\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">30</span>\n615\t                    </div>\n616\t\n617\t                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n618\t                        <label>Fresnel Weight Decay Rate</label>\n619\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-fresnel\" min=\"1.0\" max=\"4.0\" step=\"0.1\" value=\"2.0\">\n620\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">2.0</span>\n621\t                    </div>\n622\t\n623\t                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n624\t                        <label>Subcarrier Count (NBVI)</label>\n625\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-subcarriers\" min=\"8\" max=\"47\" step=\"1\" value=\"16\">\n626\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">16</span>\n627\t                    </div>\n628\t\n629\t                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n630\t                        <label>Breathing Sensitivity</label>\n631\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-breathing\" min=\"0.001\" max=\"0.1\" step=\"0.001\" value=\"0.005\">\n632\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">0.005</span>\n633\t                    </div>\n634\t\n635\t                    <div class=\"tuning-actions\">\n636\t                        <button id=\"tune-apply-btn\" class=\"tuning-btn\">Apply Parameters</button>\n637\t                        <button id=\"tune-apply-live-btn\" class=\"tuning-btn tuning-btn-primary\">Apply to Live</button>\n638\t                        <button id=\"tune-reset-btn\" class=\"tuning-btn tuning-btn-secondary\">Reset to Live</button>\n639\t                    </div>\n640\t                </div>\n641\t            </div>\n642\t        `;\n643\t\n644\t        // Attach event listeners\n645\t        panel.querySelector('#tune-apply-btn').addEventListener('click', applyTuningParams);\n646\t        panel.querySelector('#tune-apply-live-btn').addEventListener('click', applyToLive);\n647\t        panel.querySelector('#tune-reset-btn').addEventListener('click', function startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs) {\n        const fromISO = new Date(fromMs).toISOString();\n        const toISO = toMs ? new Date(toMs).toISOString() : '';\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/start', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                from_iso8601: fromISO,\n                to_iso8601: toISO,\n                speed: 1\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to start replay: ' + data.speed;\n\n            console.log('[Replay] Session started:', data);\n            updateUI();\n            return data.session_id;\n        });\n    }\n\n    function stopReplaySession() {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/stop', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n          state.activeSessionId = null;\n            state.isPaused = false;\n            updateUI();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function seekReplay(targetMs) {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to seek: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n            updateUI();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function setPlaybackSpeed(speed) {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId)      })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to set state: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(() => {\n            state.sessionState = playbackState;\n            updatePlayPauseButton();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function fetchSessionBlobs(sessionId) {\n        if (!sessionId) fetch session state');\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                // Feed replay blobs to 3D scene\n                if (data.blobs && data.blobs.length > 0 && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n                    Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n                }\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.warn('[Replay] Failed to fetch session blobs:', err);\n            });\n    }\n\n    function tuneParams(params) {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId)                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n                ...params\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to tune params: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            console.log('[Replay] Parameters tuned:', data.params);\n            return data;\n        });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Handlers\n    // ============================================\n    function onBackToLive() {\n        exitReplayMode();\n    }\n\n    function onPlayPause() {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n\n        const newState = state.sessionState === 'playing' ? 'paused' : 'playing';\n        setPlaybackState(newState);\n    }\n\n    function onSpeedChange(e) {\n        const speed = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);\n        setPlaybackSpeed(speed);\n    }\n\n    function onScrub(e) {\n        const percent = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n        const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n        const targetMs = state.sessionFromMs + Math.round(rangeMs * percent / 100);\n\n        seekReplay(targetMs);\n    }\n\n    function onExitReplay() {\n        exitReplayMode();\n    }\n\n    function onTuneParams() {\n        showTuningPanel();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // UI Updates\n    // ============================================\n    function updateUI() {\n        updateTimestampDisplay();\n        updateRangeDisplay();\n        updateScrubber();\n        updatePlayPauseButton();\n    }\n\n    function updateTimestampDisplay() {\n        if (!elements.timestamp) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n            elements.timestamp.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionCurrentMs);\n        } else {\n            elements.timestamp.textContent = '--:--:--';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateRangeDisplay() {\n        if (!elements.range) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n            elements.range.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionFromMs) +\n                ' / ' + formatTimestamp(state.sessionToMs);\n        } else {\n            elements.range.textContent = '0:00 / 0:00';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateScrubber() {\n        if (!elements.scrubber) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n            const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n            if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n                const offset = state.sessionCurrentMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n                const percent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (offset / rangeMs) * 100));\n                elements.scrubber.value = percent;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updatePlayPauseButton() {\n        if (!elements.playIcon || !elements.pauseIcon) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionState === 'playing') {\n            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'none';\n            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'block';\n        } else {\n            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'block';\n            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Mode Transitions\n    // ============================================\n    function enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs) {\n        console.log('[Replay] Entering replay mode:', { fromMs, toMs });\n\n        state.isReplayMode = true;\n\n        // Start replay session\n        startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs).then(sessionId => {\n            // Show replay control bar\n            if (elements.bar) {\n                elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n            }\n\n            // Notify 3D visualization to enter replay mode\n            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode) {\n                Viz3D.enterReplayMode();\n            }\n\n            return sessionId;\n        }).catch(err => {\n            console.error('[Replay] Failed to enter replay mode:', err);\n            if (window.SpaxelApp) {\n                SpaxelApp.showToast('Failed to enter replay mode: ' + err.message, 'error');\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function exitReplayMode() {\n        console.log('[Replay] Exiting replay mode');\n\n        // Stop replay session\n        return stopReplaySession().then(() => {\n            state.isReplayMode = false;\n            state.isPaused = false;\n\n            // Hide replay control bar\n            if (elements.bar) {\n                elements.bar.style.display = 'none';\n            }\n\n            // Notify 3D visualization to exit replay mode\n            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.exitReplayMode) {\n                Viz3D.exitReplayMode();\n            }\n\n            // Clear timeline selection and now-replaying chip\n            if (window.SpaxelSidebarTimeline) {\n                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n            }\n\n            // Navigate back to live mode\n            if (window.SpaxelRouter) {\n                SpaxelRouter.navigate('live');\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function pauseLiveMode() {\n        if (state.isPaused) {\n            // Already paused, exit replay mode\n            exitReplayMode();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        console.log('[Replay] Pausing live mode');\n\n        state.isPaused = true;\n\n        // Calculate replay window (default: 60 seconds before now)\n        const now = Date.now();\n        const fromMs = now - (CONFIG.defaultReplayWindowSec * 1000);\n        const toMs = now;\n\n        enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Timeline Loop\n    // ============================================\n    let timelineInterval = null;\n\n    function startTimelineLoop() {\n        if (timelineInterval) return;\n\n        timelineInterval = setInterval(() => {\n            if (state.sessionState === 'playing' && state.activeSessionId) {\n                // Fetch current session state\n                fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n                    .then(res => res.json())\n                    .then(data => {\n                        state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n                        updateUI();\n\n                        // Trigger 3D visualization update with replay blobs\n                        if (data.blobs && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n                            Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n                        }\n                    })\n                    .catch(err => {\n                        console.error('[Replay] Failed to fetch session state:', err);\n                    });\n            }\n        }, CONFIG.timelineUpdateInterval);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Tuning Panel\n    // ============================================\n    function showTuningPanel() {\n        // Create or show tuning panel overlay\n        let panel = document.getElementById('replay-tuning-panel');\n        if (!panel) {\n            panel = createTuningPanel();\n            document.body.appendChild(panel);\n        }\n\n        panel.style.display = 'flex';\n\n        // Fetch current session params\n        if (state.activeSessionId) {\n            fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n                .then(res => res.json())\n                .then(data => {\n                    populateTuningPanel(data.params || {});\n                });\n        }\n    }\n\n    function createTuningPanel() {\n        const panel = document.createElement('div');\n        panel.id = 'replay-tuning-panel';\n        panel.className = 'replay-tuning-panel';\n\n        panel.innerHTML = `\n            <div class=\"replay-tuning-content\">\n                <div class=\"replay-tuning-header\">\n                    <h2>Detection Parameters</h2>\n                    <button class=\"replay-tuning-close\" onclick=\"this.parentElement.parentElement.parentElement.style.display='none'\">\n                        <svg </div>\n        `;\n\n        // Attach event listeners\n        panel.querySelector('#tune-apply-btn').addEventListener('click', applyTuningParams);\n        panel.querySelector('#tune-apply-live-btn').addEventListener('click', applyToLive);\n        panel.querySelector('#tune-reset-btn').addEventListener('click', resetTuningParams);\n\n        // Update value displays on slider change\n        panel.querySelectorAll('input[type=\"range\"]').forEach(input => {\n            input.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                const valueSpan = });\n\n        return panel;\n    }\n\n    function populateTuningPanel(params) {\n        const panel = document.getElementById('replay-tuning-panel');\n        if (!panel) return;\n\n        // input.parentElement.querySelector('.tuning-value').textContent = params.tau_s;\n            }\n        }\n        if (params.fresnel_decay !== undefined) {\n            const input = Cannot apply to live.', 'error');\n            }\n            return;\n        }\n\n        fetch('/api/replay/apply-live', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                session_id: state.activeSessionId\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to apply to live: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            console.log('[Replay] Applied to          panel.style.display = 'none';\n        })\n        .catch(err => {\n            console.error('[Replay] Failed to apply to live:', err);\n            if (window.SpaxelApp) {\n                SpaxelApp.showToast('Failed to apply to live: ' + err.message, 'error');\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function resetTuningParams() {\n        // Reset to live default values\n        const params = {\n            delta_rms_threshold: 0.02,\n            tau_s: 30,\n            fresnel_decay: 2.0,\n            n_subcarriers: 16,\n            breathing_sensitivity: 0.005,\n        };\n\n        tuneParams(params).then(() => {\n            populateTuningPanel(params);\n            if (window.SpaxelApp) {\n                SpaxelApp.showToast('Parameters reset to live defaults',    // Utilities\n    // ============================================\n    function formatTimestamp(ms) {\n        const date = new Date(ms);\n        const hours = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minutes = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const seconds = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');\n        return `${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Jump-to-Time (tap-to-jump from timeline)\n    // ============================================\n    function jumpToTime(timestampMs, windowMs) {\n        if (!windowMs) windowMs = 5000; // ±5 seconds default\n\n        console.log('[Replay] Jump to time:', timestampMs, 'window:', windowMs);\n\n        state.isReplayMode = true;\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/jump-to-time', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                timestamp_ms: timestampMs,\n                window_ms: windowMs\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to jump to time: ' + res.statusText);\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            state.activeSessionId = data.session_id;\n            state.sessionFromMs = data.from_ms;\n to enter replay mode\n            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode) {\n                Viz3D.enterReplayMode();\n            }\n\n            // Fetch session state (includes blobs at the seeked timestamp)\n            // so the 3D scene immediately shows the correct state\n            return fetchSessionBlobs(data.session_id).then(function() {\n                console.log('[Replay] Jump-to-time session:', data.session_id);\n                return data;\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Cross-Module Callback (from timeline click)\n    // ============================================\n    function onJumpToTime(sessionId, timestampMs) {\n        console.log('[Replay] onJumpToTime callback:', sessionId, timestampMs);\n\n        state.activeSessionId = sessionId;\n        state.sessionCurrentMs = timestampMs;\n        state.sessionState = 'paused';\n        state.sessionSpeed = 1;\n        state.isReplayMode = true;\n\n        // Fetch full session details from the API\n        fetch('/api/replay/session/' + encodeURIComponent(sessionId))\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch session');\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                state.sessionFromMs = data.from_ms;\n                state.sessionToMs = data.to_ms;\n                state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms || timestampMs;\n                state.sessionState = data.state || 'paused';\n                state.sessionSpeed = data.speed || 1;\n\n                // Show replay control bar\n                if (elements.bar) {\n                    elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n                }\n\n                updateUI();\n\n                // Notify 3D visualization to enter replay mode\n                if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode) {\n                    Viz3D.enterReplayMode();\n                }\n\n                // Feed replay blobs to 3D scene if available\n                if (data.blobs && data.blobs.length > 0 && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n                    Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n                }\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[Replay] onJumpToTime session fetch failed:', err);\n                // Still show the bar with partial state\n                if (elements.bar) {\n                    elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n                }\n                updateUI();\n            });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Public API\n    // /api/replay/seek.\n332\t// Seeks to the specified timestamp within the session.\n333\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) seek(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n334\t\tvar req seekRequest\n335\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n336\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + DeltaRMSThreshold is the motion detection threshold (0.001-1.0).\n395\t\tDeltaRMSThreshold *float64 `json:\"delta_rms_threshold,omitempty\"`\n396\t\t// TauS is the EMA baseline time constant in seconds (1-600).\n397\t\tTauS *float64 `json:\"tau_s,omitempty\"`\n398\t\t// FresnelDecay is the Fresnel zone weight decay rate (1.0-4.0).\n399\t\tFresnelDecay *float64 `json:\"fresnel_decay,omitempty\"`\n400\t\t// Subcarriers is the number of subcarriers for NBVI selection (8-47).\n401\t\tSubcarriers *int `json:\"n_subcarriers,omitempty\"`\n402\t\t// BreathingSensitivity is the breathing detection threshold in radians RMS (0.001-0.1).\n403\t\tBreathingSensitivity *float64 `json:\"breathing_sensitivity,omitempty\"`\n404\t}\n405\t\n406\t// tune handles POST /api/replay/tune.\n407\t// Updates pipeline parameters for the replay session.\n408\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) tune(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n409\t\tvar req tuneRequest\n410\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n411\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n412\t\t\treturn\n413\t\t}\n414\t\n415\t\tif _, err := h.worker.GetSession(req.SessionID); err != nil {\n416\t\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n417\t\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n418\t\t\t\treturn\n419\t\t\t}\n420\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n421\t\t\treturn\n422\t\t}\n423\t\n424\t\t// Build params map\n425\t\tparams := make(map[string]interface{})\n426\t\tif req.DeltaRMSThreshold != nil {\n427\t\t\tparams[\"delta_rms_threshold\"] = *req.DeltaRMSThreshold\n428\t\t}\n429\t\tif req.TauS != nil {\n430\t\t\tparams[\"tau_s\"] = *req.TauS\n431\t\t}\n432\t\tif req.FresnelDecay != nil {\n433\t\t\tparams[\"fresnel_decay\"] = *req.FresnelDecay\n434\t\t}\n435\t\tif req.Subcarriers != nil {\n436\t\t\tparams[\"n_subcarriers\"] = *req.Subcarriers\n437\t\t}\n438\t\tif req.BreathingSensitivity != nil {\n439\t\t\tparams[\"breathing_sensitivity\"] = *req.BreathingSensitivity\n440\t\t}\n441\t\n442\t\tif err := h.worker.UpdateParams(req.SessionID, params); err != nil {\n443\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n444\t\t\treturn\n445\t\t}\n446\t\n447\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session tuned: %s params=%+v\", req.SessionID, params)\n448\t\n449\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n450\t\t\t\"status\":  \"tuned\",\n451\t\t\t\"params\":  params,\n452\t\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n453\t\t})\n454\t}\n455\t\n456\t// setSpeedRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/set-speed.\n457\ttype setSpeedRequest struct {\n458\t\t// SessionID is the ID of the session to modify.\n459\t\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n460\t\t// Speed is the playback speed multiplier: 1, 2, or 5.\n461\t\tSpeed int `json:\"speed\"`\n462\t}\n463\t\n464\t// setSpeed handles POST /api/replay/set-speed.\n465\t// Changes the playback speed for a replay session.\n466\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) setSpeed(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n467\t\tvar req setSpeedRequest\n468\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n469\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n470\t\t\treturn\n471\t\t}\n472\t\n473\t\tif req.Speed != 1 && req.Speed != 2 && req.Speed != 5 {\n474\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"speed must be 1, 2, or 5\"})\n475\t\t\treturn\n476\t\t}\n477\t\n478\t\tif err := h.worker.SetPlaybackSpeed(req.SessionID, req.Speed); err != nil {\n479\t\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n480\t\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n481\t\t\t\treturn\n482\t\t\t}\n483\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n484\t\t\treturn\n485\t\t}\n486\t\n487\t\t// Update API layer session state\n488\t\th.mu.Lock()\n489\t\tif s, exists := h.sessions[req.SessionID]; exists {\n490\t\t\ts.Speed = req.Speed\n491\t\t}\n492\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n493\t\n494\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session speed changed: %s to %dx\", req.SessionID, req.Speed)\n495\t\n496\t\twriteJSON(w, represents the request body for POST /api/replay/set-state.\n504\ttype setStateRequest struct {\n505\t\t// SessionID is the ID of the session to modify.\n506\t\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n507\t\t// State is the playback state: \"playing\" or \"paused\".\n508\t\tState string `json:\"state\"`\n509\t}\n510\t\n511\t// setState handles POST /api/replay/set-state.\n512\t// Changes the playback state for a replay session.\n513\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) setState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n514\t\tvar req setStateRequest\n515\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n516\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n517\t\t\treturn\n518\t\t}\n519\t\n520\t\tif req.State != \"playing\" && req.State != \"paused\" {\n521\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"state must be 'playing' or 'paused'\"})\n522\t\t\treturn\n523\t\t}\n524\t\n525\t\tif err := h.worker.SetState(req.SessionID, req.State); err != nil {\n526\t\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n527\t\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n528\t\t\t\treturn\n529\t\t\t}\n530\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n531\t\t\treturn\n532\t\t}\n533\t\n534\t\t// Update API layer session state\n535\t\th.mu.Lock()\n536\t\tif s, exists := h.sessions[req.SessionID]; exists {\n537\t\t\ts.State = req.State\n538\t\t}\n539\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n540\t\n541\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session state changed: %s to %s\", req.SessionID, req.State)\n542\t\n543\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n544\t\t\t\"status\":  \"state_set\",\n545\t\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n546\t\t\t\"state\":   req.State,\n547\t\t})\n548\t}\n549\t\n550\t// getSessionState handles GET /api/replay/session/{id}.\n551\t// Returns the current state of a replay session including blobs.\n552\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) getSessionState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n553\t\tsessionID := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n554\t\n555\t\tsession, err := h.worker.GetSession(sessionID)\n556\t\tif err != nil {\n557\t\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n558\t\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n559\t\t\t\treturn\n560\t\t\t}\n561\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n562\t\t\treturn\n563\t\t}\n564\t\n565\t\t// Update API layer session state\n566\t\th.mu.Lock()\n567\t\tif s, exists := h.sessions[sessionID]; exists {\n568\t\t\ts.CurrentMS = session.CurrentMS\n569\t\t\ts.State = session.State\n570\t\t}\n571\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n572\t\n573\t\t// Calculate progress\n574\t\tduration := session.ToMS - session.FromMS\n575\t\tprogress := 0.0\n576\t\tif duration > 0 {\n577\t\t\tprogress = float64(session.CurrentMS-session.FromMS) / float64(duration)\n578\t\t}\n579\t\n580\t\t// Convert replay blobs to API format\n581\t\tblobs := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(session.LastBlobs))\n582\t\tfor _, b := range session.LastBlobs {\n583\t\t\tblob := map[string]interface{}{\n584\t\t\t\t\"id\":                  b.ID,\n585\t\t\t\t\"x\":                   b.X,\n586\t\t\t\t\"y\":                   b.Y,\n587\t\t\t\t\"z\":                   b.Z,\n588\t\t\t\t\"vx\":                  b.VX,\n589\t\t\t\t\"vy\":                  b.VY,\n590\t\t\t\t\"vz\":                  b.VZ,\n591\t\t\t\t\"weight\":              b.Weight,\n592\t\t\t\t\"posture\":             b.Posture,\n593\t\t\t\t\"person_id\":           b.PersonID,\n594\t\t\t\t\"person_label\":        b.PersonLabel,\n595\t\t\t\t\"person_color\":        b.PersonColor,\n596\t\t\t\t\"identity_confidence\": b.IdentityConfidence,\n597\t\t\t\t\"identity_source\":     b.IdentitySource,\n598\t\t\t\t\"trail\":               b.Trail,\n599\t\t\t}\n600\t\t\tblobs = append(blobs, blob)\n601\t\t}\n602\t\n603\t\t// Build response with session state and blobs\n604\t\tresponse := map[string]interface{}{\n605\t\t\t\"session_id\":  sessionID,\n606\t\t\t\"current_ms\":  session.CurrentMS,\n607\t\t\t\"from_ms\":     session.FromMS,\n608\t\t\t\"to_ms\":       session.ToMS,\n609\t\t\t\"state\":       session.State,\n610\t\t\t\"speed\":       session.Speed,\n611\t\t\t\"progress\":    progress,\n612\t\t\t\"params\":      session.Params,\n613\t\t\t\"blobs\":       blobs,\n614\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": session.LastBlobTime,\n615\t\t}\n616\t\n617\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n618\t}\n619\t\n620\t// jumpToTimeRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\n621\ttype jumpToTimeRequest struct {\n622\t\t// TimestampMS is the target timestamp in epoch milliseconds.\n623\t\tTimestampMS int64 `json:\"timestamp_ms\"`\n624\t\t// WindowMS is the time window around the timestamp (default 5000ms).\n625\t\tWindowMS int64 `json:\"window_ms,omitempty\"`\n626\t}\n627\t\n628\t// jumpToTime handles POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\n629\t// Creates a replay session centered on the given timestamp, seeks to it,\n630\t// and sets it as the active session. Stops any previous active session first.\n631\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) jumpToTime(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n632\t\tvar req jumpToTimeRequest\n633\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n634\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n635\t\t\treturn\n636\t\t}\n637\t\n638\t\tif req.TimestampMS <= 0 {\n639\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"timestamp_ms is required and must be positive\"})\n640\t\t\treturn\n641\t\t}\n642\t\n643\t\twindowMS := req.WindowMS\n644\t\tif windowMS <= 0 {\n645\t\t\twindowMS = 5000 // ±5 seconds default\n646\t\t}\n647\t\n648\t\tfromMS := req.TimestampMS - windowMS\n649\t\ttoMS := req.TimestampMS + windowMS\n650\t\n651\t\t// Stop previous active session if any\n652\t\th.mu.Lock()\n653\t\tprevID := h.activeSessionID\n654\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n655\t\n656\t\tif prevID != \"\" {\n657\t\t\tif err := h.worker.StopSession(prevID); err == nil {\n658\t\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n659\t\t\t\tdelete(h.sessions, prevID)\n660\t\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n661\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Previous replay session stopped: %s\", prevID)\n662\t\t\t}\n663\t\t}\n664\t\n665\t\t// Start new session\n666\t\tsessionID, err := h.worker.StartSession(fromMS, toMS, 1)\n667\t\tif err != nil {\n668\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": \"failed to start session: \" + err.Error()})\n669\t\t\treturn\n670\t\t}\n671\t\n672\t\t// Seek to target timestamp\n673\t\tif err := h.worker.Seek(sessionID, req.TimestampMS); err != nil {\n674\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Jump-to-time seek failed: %v\", err)\n675\t\t}\n676\t\n677\t\t// Track in API layer\n678\t\tsession := &_replaySession{\n679\t\t\tID:        sessionID,\n680\t\t\tFromMS:    fromMS,\n681\t\t\tToMS:      toMS,\n682\t\t\tCurrentMS: req.TimestampMS,\n683\t\t\tSpeed:     1,\n684\t\t\tState:     \"paused\",\n685\t\t\tParams:    make(map[string]interface{}),\n686\t\t\tCreatedAt: formatTimestamp(fromMS),\n687\t\t}\n688\t\th.mu.Lock()\n689\t\th.sessions[sessionID] = session\n690\t\th.activeSessionID = sessionID\n691\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n692\t\n693\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Jump-to-time: session %s at %d (window ±%dms)\", sessionID, req.TimestampMS, windowMS)\n694\t\n695\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n696\t\t\t\"session_id\":   sessionID,\n697\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": req.TimestampMS,\n698\t\t\t\"from_ms\":      fromMS,\n699\t\t\t\"to_ms\":        toMS,\n700\t\t\t\"state\":        \"paused\",\n701\t\t})\n702\t}\n703\t\n704\t// applyLiveRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/apply-live.\n705\ttype applyLiveRequest struct {\n706\t\t// SessionID is the ID of the replay session to apply parameters from.\n707\t\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n708\t}\n709\t\n710\t// applyLive handles POST /api/replay/apply-live.\n711\t// Applies the current replay session's parameters to the live pipeline.\n712\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) applyLive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n713\t\tvar req applyLiveRequest\n714\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n715\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n716\t\t\treturn\n717\t\t}\n718\t\n719\t\tif req.SessionID == \"\" {\n720\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session_id is required\"})\n721\t\t\treturn\n722\t\t}\n723\t\n724\t\t// Apply the replay session's parameters to live via the existing ApplyToLive method\n725\t\tif err := h.ApplyToLive(); err != nil {\n726\t\t\tif err.Error() == \"no active replay session\" {\n727\t\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"no active replay session\"})\n728\t\t\t\treturn\n729\t\t\t}\n730\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n731\t\t\treturn\n732\t\t}\n733\t\n734\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay parameters applied to live: session=%s\", req.SessionID)\n735\t\n736\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n737\t\t\t\"status\":  \"applied\",\n738\t\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n739\t\t})\n740\t}\n741\t\n742\t// Helper functions\n743\tfunc timeNowMillis() int64 {\n744\t\treturn time.Now().UnixNano() / 1e6\n745\t}\n746\t\n747\tfunc parseISO8601(s string) (int64, error) {\n748\t\tt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, s)\n749\t\tif err != nil {\n750\t\t\treturn 0, err\n751\t\t}\n752\t\treturn t.UnixNano() / 1e6, nil\n753\t}\n754\t\n755\tfunc formatTimestamp(ms int64) string {\n756\t\treturn time.Unix(ms/1000, (ms%1000)*1e6).Format(time.RFC3339Nano)\n757\t}\n758\t\n759\t// GetReplayPath returns the path to the CSI replay binary file.\n760\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) GetReplayPath() string {\n761\t\tif h.replayPath != \"\" {\n762\t\t\treturn h.replayPath\n763\t\t}\n764\t\treturn \"/data/csi_replay.bin\" // Default path\n765\t}\n766\t\n767\t// SetReplayPath sets the path to the CSI replay binary file.\n768\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) SetReplayPath(path string) {\n769\t\th.mu.Lock()\n770\t\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n771\t\th.replayPath = path\n772\t}\n773\t\n774\t// GetStoreStats returns statistics about the replay store.\n775\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) GetStoreStats() replay.StoreStats {\n776\t\treturn h.worker.GetStoreStats()\n777\t}\n778\t\n779\t// GetSessions returns a list of all active replay sessions.\n780\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) GetSessions() []SessionInfo {\n781\t\th.mu.RLock()\n782\t\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n783\t\n784\t\tsessions := make([]SessionInfo, 0, len(h.sessions))\n785\t\tfor _, s := range h.sessions {\n786\t\t\tsessions = append(sessions, SessionInfo{\n787\t\t\t\tID:        s.ID,\n788\t\t\t\tFromMS:    s.FromMS,\n789\t\t\t\tToMS:      s.ToMS,\n790\t\t\t\tCurrentMS: s.CurrentMS,\n791\t\t\t\tState:     s.State,\n792\t\t\t})\n793\t\t}\n794\t\treturn sessions\n795\t}\n796\t\n797\t// SeekTo moves the active replay session to the target timestamp.\n798\t// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\n799\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) SeekTo(targetMS int64) error {\n800\t\th.mu.Lock()\n801\t\tsessionID := h.activeSessionID\n802\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n803\t\n804\t\tif sessionID == \"\" {\n805\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n806\t\t}\n807\t\n808\t\treturn h.worker.Seek(sessionID, targetMS)\n809\t}\n810\t\n811\t// Play starts playback of the active replay session at the specified speed.\n812\t// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\n813\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) Play(speed float64) error {\n814\t\th.mu.Lock()\n815\t\tsessionID := h.activeSessionID\n816\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n817\t\n818\t\tif sessionID == \"\" {\n819\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n820\t\t}\n821\t\n822\t\t// Convert float speed to int (1x=1, 2x=2, 0.5x=1 for now)\n823\t\tspeedInt := 1\n824\t\tif speed >= 2.0 {\n825\t\t\tspeedInt = 2\n826\t\t} else if speed >= 5.0 {\n827\t\t\tspeedInt = 5\n828\t\t}\n829\t\n830\t\t// Set speed first\n831\t\tif err := h.worker.SetPlaybackSpeed(sessionID, speedInt); err != nil {\n832\t\t\treturn err\n833\t\t}\n834\t\n835\t\t// Then set state to playing\n836\t\treturn h.worker.SetState(sessionID, \"playing\")\n837\t}\n838\t\n839\t// Pause pauses playback of the active replay session.\n840\t// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\n841\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) Pause() error {\n842\t\th.mu.Lock()\n843\t\tsessionID := h.activeSessionID\n844\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n845\t\n846\t\tif sessionID == \"\" {\n847\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n848\t\t}\n849\t\n850\t\treturn h.worker.SetState(sessionID, \"paused\")\n851\t}\n852\t\n853\t// SetParams updates the replay pipeline parameters for the active session.\n854\t// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\n855\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) SetParams(params *replay.TunableParams) error {\n856\t\th.mu.Lock()\n857\t\tsessionID := h.activeSessionID\n858\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n859\t\n860\t\tif sessionID == \"\" {\n861\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n862\t\t}\n863\t\n864\t\t// Convert TunableParams to map for worker\n865\t\tparamMap := make(map[string]interface{})\n866\t\tif params.DeltaRMSThreshold != nil {\n867\t\t\tparamMap[\"delta_rms_threshold\"] = *params.DeltaRMSThreshold\n868\t\t}\n869\t\tif params.TauS != nil {\n870\t\t\tparamMap[\"tau_s\"] = *params.TauS\n871\t\t}\n872\t\tif params.FresnelDecay != nil {\n873\t\t\tparamMap[\"fresnel_decay\"] = *params.FresnelDecay\n874\t\t}\n875\t\tif params.FresnelWeightSigma != nil {\n876\t\t\tparamMap[\"fresnel_weight_sigma\"] = *params.FresnelWeightSigma\n877\t\t}\n878\t\tif params.MinConfidence != nil {\n879\t\t\tparamMap[\"min_confidence\"] = *params.MinConfidence\n880\t\t}\n881\t\tif params.BreathingSensitivity != nil {\n882\t\t\tparamMap[\"breathing_sensitivity\"] = *params.BreathingSensitivity\n883\t\t}\n884\t\tif params.NSubcarriers != nil {\n885\t\t\tparamMap[\"n_subcarriers\"] = *params.NSubcarriers\n886\t\t}\n887\t\n888\t\treturn h.worker.UpdateParams(sessionID, paramMap)\n889\t}\n890\t\n891\t// ApplyToLive copies the current replay parameters to the live configuration.\n892\t// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\n893\tfunc (h *ReplayHandler) ApplyToLive() error {\n894\t\th.mu.Lock()\n895\t\tsessionID := h.activeSessionID\n896\t\tsettingsHandler := h.settingsHandler\n897\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n898\t\n899\t\tif sessionID == \"\" {\n900\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n901\t\t}\n902\t\n903\t\tif settingsHandler == nil {\n904\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] ApplyToLive: No settings handler configured, parameters not persisted\")\n905\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"settings handler not configured\")\n906\t\t}\n907\t\n908\t\t// Get the current session's parameters\n909\t\tsession, err := h.worker.GetSession(sessionID)\n910\t\tif err != nil {\n911\t\t\treturn err\n912\t\t}\n913\t\n914\t\t// Convert replay params to settings format\n915\t\tupdates := make(map[string]interface{})\n916\t\n917\t\t// Map replay parameters to live sessions.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) listSessions(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tstats := h.worker.GetStoreStats()\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tsessions := make([]*_replaySession, 0, info)\n}\n\n// scanTimestamps scans the replay store to find oldest and newest timestamps.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) scanTimestamps(oldest, newest *int64) {\n\tstats := h.worker.GetStoreStats()\n\tif !stats.HasData {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Scan for oldest and newest\n\tstore := h.worker.GetStore()\n\t_ = store.Scan(func(recvTimeNS int64, frame []byte) bool { //nolint:errcheck // scan errors newest\n\t})\n}\n\n// startSessionRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/start.\ntype startSessionRequest struct {\n\t// FromISO8601 is the start timestamp in ISO8601 format (e.g., \"paused\",\n\t\tParams:    make(map[string]interface{}),\n\t\tCreatedAt: formatTimestamp(fromMS),\n\t}\n\th.sessions[sessionID] = session\n\th.nextID++\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] (h *ReplayHandler) seek(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req seekRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, the playback state: \"playing\" or \"paused\".\n\tState string `json:\"state\"`\n}\n\n// setState handles POST /api/replay/set-state.\n// Changes the playback state for a replay session.\nfunc (h map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif req.State != \"playing\" && req.State != \"paused\" {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"state must be 'playing' or 'paused'\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.worker.SetState(req.SessionID, req.State); err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Update API layer session state\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tif s, exists := h.sessions[req.SessionID]; exists {\n\t\ts.State = req.State\n\t}\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session state changed: %s to %s\", req.SessionID, req.State)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":  \"state_set\",\n\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n\t\t\"state\":   req.State,\n\t})\n}\n\n// getSessionState handles GET /api/replay/session/{id}.\n// Returns the current state of a replay session including blobs.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) getSessionState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tsessionID := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\tsession, err := h.worker.GetSession(sessionID)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Update API layer session state\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tif s, exists := h.sessions[sessionID]; exists {\n\t\ts.CurrentMS = session.CurrentMS\n\t\ts.State = session.State\n\t}\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Calculate progress\n\tduration := session.ToMS - session.FromMS\n\tprogress := 0.0\n\tif duration > 0 {\n\t\tprogress = float64(session.CurrentMS-session.FromMS) / float64(duration)\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert replay blobs to API format\n\tblobs := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(session.LastBlobs))\n\tfor _, b := range session.LastBlobs {\n\t\tblob := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"id\":                  b.ID,\n\t\t\t\"x\":                   b.X,\n\t\t\t\"y\":                   b.Y,\n\t\t\t\"z\":                   b.Z,\n\t\t\t\"vx\":                  b.VX,\n\t\t\t\"vy\":                  b.VY,\n\t\t\t\"vz\":                  b.VZ,\n\t\t\t\"weight\":              b.Weight,\n\t\t\t\"posture\":             b.Posture,\n\t\t\t\"person_id\":           b.PersonID,\n\t\t\t\"person_label\":        b.PersonLabel,\n\t\t\t\"person_color\":        b.PersonColor,\n\t\t\t\"identity_confidence\": b.IdentityConfidence,\n\t\t\t\"identity_source\":     b.IdentitySource,\n\t\t\t\"trail\":               b.Trail,\n\t\t}\n\t\tblobs = append(blobs, blob)\n\t}\n\n\t// Build response with session state and blobs\n\tresponse := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"session_id\":  sessionID,\n\t\t\"current_ms\":  session.CurrentMS,\n\t\t\"from_ms\":     session.FromMS,\n\t\t\"to_ms\":       session.ToMS,\n\t\t\"state\":       session.State,\n\t\t\"speed\":       session.Speed,\n\t\t\"progress\":    progress,\n\t\t\"params\":      session.Params,\n\t\t\"blobs\":       blobs,\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": session.LastBlobTime,\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// jumpToTimeRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\ntype jumpToTimeRequest struct {\n\t// TimestampMS is the target timestamp in epoch milliseconds.\n\tTimestampMS int64 `json:\"timestamp_ms\"`\n\t// WindowMS is the time window around the timestamp (default 5000ms).\n\tWindowMS int64 `json:\"window_ms,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// jumpToTime handles POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\n// Creates a replay session centered on the given timestamp, seeks to it,\n// and sets it as the active session. Stops any previous active session first.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) jumpToTime(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req jumpToTimeRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif req.TimestampMS <= 0 {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"timestamp_ms is required and must be positive\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\twindowMS := req.WindowMS\n\tif windowMS <= 0 {\n\t\twindowMS = 5000 // ±5 seconds default\n\t}\n\n\tfromMS := req.TimestampMS - windowMS\n\ttoMS := req.TimestampMS + windowMS\n\n\t// Stop previous active session if any\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tprevID := h.activeSessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif prevID != \"\" {\n\t\tif err := h.worker.StopSession(prevID); err == nil {\n\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tdelete(h.sessions, prevID)\n\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Previous replay session stopped: %s\", prevID)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Start new session\n\tsessionID, err := h.worker.StartSession(fromMS, toMS, 1)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": \"failed to start session: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Seek to target timestamp\n\tif err := h.worker.Seek(sessionID, req.TimestampMS); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Jump-to-time seek failed: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Track in API layer\n\tsession := &_replaySession{\n\t\tID:        sessionID,\n\t\tFromMS:    fromMS,\n\t\tToMS:      toMS,\n\t\tCurrentMS: req.TimestampMS,\n\t\tSpeed:     1,\n\t\tState:     \"paused\",\n\t\tParams:    make(map[string]interface{}),\n\t\tCreatedAt: formatTimestamp(fromMS),\n\t}\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.sessions[sessionID] = session\n\th.activeSessionID = sessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert float speed to int (1x=1, 2x=2, 0.5x=1 for now)\n\tspeedInt := 1\n\tif speed >= 2.0 {\n\t\tspeedInt = 2\n\t} else if terminates the session.\nfunc (s *Session) Stop() error {\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n\n\ts.state = StateStopped\n\ts.cancel()\n\tclose(s.stopCh)\n\ts.updated_at = time.Now().UnixMilli()\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// playbackLoop is the main playback loop.\nfunc (s *Session) playbackLoop() {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(100 * time.Millisecond)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-s.ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-s.stopCh:\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tif s.state != StatePlaying {\n\t\t\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Advance position based on speed\n\t\t\tdt := int64(100 * time.Millisecond.Milliseconds() * int64(s.speed))\n\t\t\ts.currentMS += dt\n\n\t\t\t// Check if we've reached the end\n\t\t\tif s.currentMS >= s.toMS {\n\t\t\t\ts.state = StatePaused\n\t\t\t\ts.currentMS = s.toMS\n\t\t\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ts.updated_at = time.Now().UnixMilli()\n\t\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\t\t// Emit frames for the current window\n\t\t\ts.emitFrames()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// emitFrames reads and processes frames for the current position.\nfunc (s *Session) emitFrames() {\n\t// This would read frames from the store and emit them\n\t// For now, it's a placeholder\n}\n\n// ToJSON converts the session to JSON for storage.\nfunc (s *Session) ToJSON() (string, error) {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tdata := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"id\":         s.id,\n\t\t\"state\":      s.state,\n\t\t\"from_ms\":    s.fromMS,\n\t\t\"to_ms\":      s.toMS,\n\t\t\"current_ms\": s.currentMS,\n\t\t\"speed\":      s.speed,\n\t\t\"created_at\": s.created_at,\n\t\t\"updated_at\": s.updated_at,\n\t}\n\n\tif s.params != nil {\n\t\tdata[\"params\"] = s.params\n\t}\n\n\tbytes, err := json.Marshal(data)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\treturn string(bytes), nil\n}\n\n// Errors\nvar (\n\tErrSessionNotFound = &ReplayError{Code: \"session_not_found\", Message: \"Session not found\"}\n\tErrInvalidTime     = &ReplayError{Code: \"invalid_time\", Message: \"Invalid time range\"}\n)\n\n// ReplayError represents a replay-specific error\ntype ReplayError struct {\n\tCode    string\n\tMessage string\n}\n\nfunc (e *ReplayError) Error() string {\n\treturn e.Message\n}\n\n// Helper functions for math operations\nfunc clamp(v, min, max float64) float64 {\n\treturn math.Max(min, math.Min(max, v))\n}\n\nfunc abs(v float64) float64 {\n\tif v < 0 {\n\t\treturn -v\n\t}\n\treturn v\n}\n\n// BlobBroadcaster broadcasts replay blob results to dashboard clients.\ntype BlobBroadcaster interface {\n\tBroadcastReplayBlobs(blobs []BlobUpdate, timestampMS int64)\n}\n\n// BlobUpdate represents a blob position during replay.\ntype BlobUpdate struct {\n\tID                 int       `json:\"id\"`\n\tX                  float64   `json:\"x\"`\n\tY                  float64   `json:\"y\"`\n\tZ                  float64   `json:\"z\"`\n\tVX                 float64   `json:\"vx\"`\n\tVY                 float64   `json:\"vy\"`\n\tVZ                 float64   `json:\"vz\"`\n\tWeight             float64   `json:\"weight\"`\n\tPosture            string    `json:\"posture,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonID           string    `json:\"person_id,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonLabel        string    `json:\"person_label,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonColor        string    `json:\"person_color,omitempty\"`\n\tIdentityConfidence float64   `json:\"identity_confidence,omitempty\"`\n\tIdentitySource     string    `json:\"identity_source,omitempty\"`\n\tTrail (*ReplayHandler, error) {\n\t// Create replay worker\n\tworker := replay.NewWorker(store, nil, nil) // processor and broadcaster set later\n\n\treturn &ReplayHandler{\n\t\tworker:   worker,\n\t\tsessions: make(map[string]*_replaySession),\n\t\tnextID:    1,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// SetProcessorManager sets the signal processing pipeline for the replay worker.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) h.worker.GetStore(); store != nil {\n\t\t\treturn store.Close()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// RegisterRoutes registers replay endpoints.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n\tr.Get(\"/api/replay/sessions\", h.listSessions)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/replay/start\", h.startSession)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/replay/stop\", h.stopSession)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/replay/seek\", h.jumpToTime)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/replay/apply-live\", h.applyLive)\n\n\t// Session state endpoint for polling\n\tr.Get(\"/api/replay/session/{id}\", h.getSessionState)\n}\n\n// replayInfo represents the
