`json:\"write_pos\"`\n\tOldestPos int64            `json:\"oldest_pos\"`\n\tOldestTS  int64            `json:\"oldest_timestamp_ms\"`\n\tNewestTS  int64            `json:\"newest_timestamp_ms\"`\n\tSessions  []*_replaySession `json:\"sessions\"`\n}\n\n// listSessions handles GET /api/replay/sessions.\n// Returns replay store statistics and all active sessions.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) listSessions(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tstats := h.worker.GetStoreStats()\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tsessions := make([]*_replaySession, 0, len(h.sessions))\n\tfor _, s := range h.sessions {\n\t\tsessions = append(sessions, s)\n\t}\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\t// Get oldest and newest timestamps\n\toldestTS := int64(0)\n\tnewestTS := int64(0)\n\tif stats.HasData {\n\t\t// Scan to find timestamps\n\t\th.scanTimestamps(&oldestTS, &newestTS)\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := replayInfo{\n\t\tHasData:   stats.HasData,\n\t\tFileSize:  stats.FileSize / (1024 * 1024),\n\t\tWritePos:  stats.WritePos,\n\t\tOldestPos: stats.OldestPos,\n\t\tOldestTS:  oldestTS,\n\t\tNewestTS:  newestTS,\n\t\tSessions:  sessions,\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, info)\n}\n\n// scanTimestamps scans the replay store to find oldest and newest timestamps.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) scanTimestamps(oldest, newest *int64) {\n\tstats := h.worker.GetStoreStats()\n\tif !stats.HasData {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Scan for oldest and newest\n\tstore := h.worker.GetStore()\n\t_ = store.Scan(func(recvTimeNS int64, frame []byte) bool { //nolint:errcheck // scan errors acceptable for timestamp query\n\t\trecvMS := recvTimeNS / 1e6\n\t\tif *oldest == 0 || recvMS < *oldest {\n\t\t\t*oldest = recvMS\n\t\t}\n\t\t*newest = recvMS\n\t\treturn true // continue to find newest\n\t})\n}\n\n// startSessionRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/start.\ntype startSessionRequest struct {\n\t// FromISO8601 is the start timestamp in ISO8601 format (e.g., \"2024-03-15T14:30:00Z\")\n\tFromISO8601 string `json:\"from_iso8601\"`\n\t// ToISO8601 is the end timestamp in ISO8601 format. If empty, defaults to now.\n\tToISO8601 string `json:\"to_iso8601\"`\n\t// Speed is the playback speed multiplier: 1, 2, or 5. Defaults to 1.\n\tSpeed int `json:\"speed,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// startSession handles POST /api/replay/start.\n// Creates a new replay session for the specified time range.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) startSession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req startSessionRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tfromMS, err := parseISO8601(req.FromISO8601)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid from_iso8601: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttoMS := timeNowMillis()\n\tif req.ToISO8601 != \"\" {\n\t\ttoMS, err = parseISO8601(req.ToISO8601)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid to_iso8601: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif toMS < fromMS {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"to_iso8601 must be after from_iso8601\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tspeed := req.Speed\n\tif speed == 0 {\n\t\tspeed = 1\n\t}\n\tif speed != 1 && speed != 2 && speed != 5 {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"speed must be 1, 2, or 5\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Start session via worker\n\tsessionID, err := h.worker.StartSession(fromMS, toMS, speed)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Track session in API layer\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tsession := &_replaySession{\n\t\tID:        sessionID,\n\t\tFromMS:    fromMS,\n\t\tToMS:      toMS,\n\t\tCurrentMS: fromMS,\n\t\tSpeed:     speed,\n\t\tState:     \"paused\",\n\t\tParams:    make(map[string]interface{}),\n\t\tCreatedAt: formatTimestamp(fromMS),\n\t}\n\th.sessions[sessionID] = session\n\th.nextID++\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session started: %s (from %d to %d, speed %dx)\",\n\t\tsessionID, fromMS, toMS, speed)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"session_id\": sessionID,\n\t\t\"from_ms\":    fromMS,\n\t\t\"to_ms\":      toMS,\n\t\t\"speed\":      speed,\n\t\t\"state\":      \"paused\",\n\t})\n}\n\n// stopSessionRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/stop.\ntype stopSessionRequest struct {\n\t// SessionID is the ID of the session to stop.\n\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n}\n\n// stopSession handles POST /api/replay/stop.\n// Stops the specified replay session and deletes it.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) stopSession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req stopSessionRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.worker.StopSession(req.SessionID); err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tdelete(h.sessions, req.SessionID)\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session stopped: %s\", req.SessionID)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":  \"stopped\",\n\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n\t})\n}\n\n// seekRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/seek.\ntype seekRequest struct {\n\t// SessionID is the ID of the session to seek within.\n\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n\t// TimestampISO8601 is the target timestamp in ISO8601 format.\n\tTimestampISO8601 string `json:\"timestamp_iso8601\"`\n}\n\n// seek handles POST /api/replay/seek.\n// Seeks to the specified timestamp within the session.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) seek(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req seekRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttargetMS, err := parseISO8601(req.TimestampISO8601)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid timestamp: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tsession, err := h.worker.GetSession(req.SessionID)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tfromMS := session.FromMS\n\ttoMS := session.ToMS\n\n\tif targetMS < fromMS || targetMS > toMS {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"timestamp outside session range\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.worker.Seek(req.SessionID, targetMS); err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"timestamp outside session range\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"timestamp outside session range\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Update API layer session state\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tif s, exists := h.sessions[req.SessionID]; exists {\n\t\ts.CurrentMS = targetMS\n\t\ts.State = \"paused\"\n\t}\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session seeked: %s to %d\", req.SessionID, targetMS)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":      \"seeked\",\n\t\t\"current_ms\":  targetMS,\n\t\t\"frame_found\": true,\n\t})\n}\n\n// tuneRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/tune.\ntype tuneRequest struct {\n\t// SessionID is the ID of the session to tune.\n\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n\t// DeltaRMSThreshold is the motion detection threshold (0.001-1.0).\n\tDeltaRMSThreshold *float64 `json:\"delta_rms_threshold,omitempty\"`\n\t// TauS is the EMA baseline time constant in seconds (1-600).\n\tTauS *float64 `json:\"tau_s,omitempty\"`\n\t// FresnelDecay is the Fresnel zone weight decay rate (1.0-4.0).\n\tFresnelDecay *float64 `json:\"fresnel_decay,omitempty\"`\n\t// Subcarriers is the number of subcarriers for NBVI selection (8-47).\n\tSubcarriers *int `json:\"n_subcarriers,omitempty\"`\n\t// BreathingSensitivity is the breathing detection threshold in radians RMS (0.001-0.1).\n\tBreathingSensitivity *float64 `json:\"breathing_sensitivity,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// tune handles POST /api/replay/tune.\n// Updates pipeline parameters for the replay session.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) tune(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req tuneRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif _, err := h.worker.GetSession(req.SessionID); err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Build params map\n\tparams := make(map[string]interface{})\n\tif req.DeltaRMSThreshold != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"delta_rms_threshold\"] = *req.DeltaRMSThreshold\n\t}\n\tif req.TauS != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"tau_s\"] = *req.TauS\n\t}\n\tif req.FresnelDecay != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"fresnel_decay\"] = *req.FresnelDecay\n\t}\n\tif req.Subcarriers != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"n_subcarriers\"] = *req.Subcarriers\n\t}\n\tif req.BreathingSensitivity != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"breathing_sensitivity\"] = *req.BreathingSensitivity\n\t}\n\n\tif Replay session tuned: %s params=%+v\", req.SessionID, params)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":  \"tuned\",\n\t\t\"params\":  params,\n\t\t\"session\": != 1 && req.Speed != 2 && req.Speed != 5 {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"speed must be 1, 2, or 5\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := req.Speed)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":  \"speed_set\",\n\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n\t\t\"speed\":   req.Speed,\n\t})\n}\n\n// setStateRequest including blobs.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) getSessionState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tsessionID := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\tsession, err := h.worker.GetSession(sessionID)\n\tif {\n\t\tprogress = float64(session.CurrentMS-session.FromMS) / float64(duration)\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert replay blobs to API format\n\tblobs := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(session.LastBlobs))\n\tfor _, b := range session.LastBlobs {\n\t\tblob := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"id\":                  b.ID,\n\t\t\t\"x\":                   b.X,\n\t\t\t\"y\":                   b.Y,\n\t\t\t\"z\":                   b.Z,\n\t\t\t\"vx\":                  b.VX,\n\t\t\t\"vy\":                  b.VY,\n\t\t\t\"vz\":                  b.VZ,\n\t\t\t\"weight\":              b.Weight,\n\t\t\t\"posture\":             b.Posture,\n\t\t\t\"person_id\":           b.PersonID,\n\t\t\t\"person_label\":        b.PersonLabel,\n\t\t\t\"person_color\":        b.PersonColor,\n\t\t\t\"identity_confidence\": b.IdentityConfidence,\n\t\t\t\"identity_source\":     b.IdentitySource,\n\t\t\t\"trail\":               b.Trail,\n\t\t}\n\t\tblobs = append(blobs, session.FromMS,\n\t\t\"to_ms\":       session.ToMS,\n\t\t\"state\":       session.State,\n\t\t\"speed\":       session.Speed,\n\t\t\"progress\":    progress,\n\t\t\"params\":      session.Params,\n\t\t\"blobs\":       blobs,\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": session.LastBlobTime,\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// jumpToTimeRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\ntype jumpToTimeRequest struct {\n\t// TimestampMS is the target timestamp in epoch milliseconds.\n\tTimestampMS int64 `json:\"timestamp_ms\"`\n\t// WindowMS is the time window around the timestamp (default 5000ms).\n\tWindowMS int64 `json:\"window_ms,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// jumpToTime handles POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\n// Creates a replay session centered on the given timestamp, seeks to it,\n// and sets it as the active session. Stops any previous active session first.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) jumpToTime(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req jumpToTimeRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif req.TimestampMS <= 0 {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, seconds default\n\t}\n\n\tfromMS := req.TimestampMS - windowMS\n\ttoMS := req.TimestampMS + windowMS\n\n\t// Stop previous active session if any\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tprevID := h.activeSessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif prevID != \"\" {\n\t\tif err := h.worker.StopSession(prevID); err == nil {\n\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tdelete(h.sessions, 1)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": \"failed to start session: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Seek to target make(map[string]interface{}),\n\t\tCreatedAt: formatTimestamp(fromMS),\n\t}\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.sessions[sessionID] = session\n\th.activeSessionID = sessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] *ReplayHandler) tune(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req tuneRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Build params map\n\tparams := make(map[string]interface{})\n\tif req.DeltaRMSThreshold != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"delta_rms_threshold\"] = *req.DeltaRMSThreshold\n\t}\n\tif req.TauS != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"tau_s\"] = *req.TauS\n\t}\n\tif req.FresnelDecay != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"fresnel_decay\"] = *req.FresnelDecay\n\t}\n\tif req.Subcarriers != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"n_subcarriers\"] = *req.Subcarriers\n\t}\n\tif req.BreathingSensitivity != nil {\n\t\tparams[\"breathing_sensitivity\"] = *req.BreathingSensitivity\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.worker.UpdateParams(req.SessionID, params); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session tuned: %s params=%+v\", req.SessionID, params)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":  \"tuned\",\n\t\t\"params\":  params,\n\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n\t})\n}\n\n// setSpeedRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/set-speed.\ntype setSpeedRequest struct {\n\t// SessionID is the ID of the session to modify.\n\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n\t// Speed is the playback speed multiplier: 1, 2, or 5.\n\tSpeed int `json:\"speed\"`\n}\n\n// setSpeed handles POST /api/replay/set-speed.\n// Changes the playback speed for a replay session.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) setSpeed(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req setSpeedRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif req.Speed != 1 && req.Speed != 2 && req.Speed != 5 {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"speed must be 1, 2, or 5\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.worker.SetPlaybackSpeed(req.SessionID, req.Speed); err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Update API layer session state\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tif s, exists := h.sessions[req.SessionID]; exists {\n\t\ts.Speed = req.Speed\n\t}\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay session speed changed: %s to %dx\", req.SessionID, req.Speed)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":  \"speed_set\",\n\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n\t\t\"speed\":   req.Speed,\n\t})\n}\n\n// setStateRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/set-state.\ntype setStateRequest struct {\n\t// SessionID is the ID of the session to modify.\n\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n\t// State is the playback state: \"playing\" or \"paused\".\n\tState string `json:\"state\"`\n}\n\n// setState handles POST /api/replay/set-state.\n// Changes the playback state for a replay session.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) setState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req setStateRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"state must be 'playing' or 'paused'\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.worker.SetState(req.SessionID, req.State); err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Update API layer session state\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tif s, exists := h.sessions[req.SessionID]; exists {\n\t\ts.State = \"state_set\",\n\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n\t\t\"state\":   req.State,\n\t})\n}\n\n// getSessionState handles GET /api/replay/session/{id}.\n// Returns the current state of a replay session including blobs.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) getSessionState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tsessionID := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\tsession, err := h.worker.GetSession(sessionID)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif err.Error() == \"session not found\" {\n\t\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{\"error\": \"session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Update API layer session state\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tif s, exists := h.sessions[sessionID]; exists {\n\t\ts.CurrentMS = session.CurrentMS\n\t\ts.State = session.State\n\t}\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Calculate progress\n\tduration := session.ToMS - session.FromMS\n\tprogress := 0.0\n\tif duration > 0 {\n\t\tprogress = float64(session.CurrentMS-session.FromMS) / float64(duration)\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert replay blobs to API format\n\tblobs := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(session.LastBlobs))\n\tfor _, b := range session.LastBlobs {\n\t\tblob := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"id\":                  b.ID,\n\t\t\t\"x\":                   b.X,\n\t\t\t\"y\":                   b.Y,\n\t\t\t\"z\":                   b.Z,\n\t\t\t\"vx\":                  b.VX,\n\t\t\t\"vy\":                  b.VY,\n\t\t\t\"vz\":                  b.VZ,\n\t\t\t\"weight\":              b.Weight,\n\t\t\t\"posture\":             b.Posture,\n\t\t\t\"person_id\":           b.PersonID,\n\t\t\t\"person_label\":        b.PersonLabel,\n\t\t\t\"person_color\":        b.PersonColor,\n\t\t\t\"identity_confidence\": b.IdentityConfidence,\n\t\t\t\"identity_source\":     b.IdentitySource,\n\t\t\t\"trail\":               b.Trail,\n\t\t}\n\t\tblobs = append(blobs, blob)\n\t}\n\n\t// Build response with session state and blobs\n\tresponse := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"session_id\":  sessionID,\n\t\t\"current_ms\":  session.CurrentMS,\n\t\t\"from_ms\":     session.FromMS,\n\t\t\"to_ms\":       session.ToMS,\n\t\t\"state\":       session.State,\n\t\t\"speed\":       session.Speed,\n\t\t\"progress\":    progress,\n\t\t\"params\":      session.Params,\n\t\t\"blobs\":       blobs,\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": session.LastBlobTime,\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// jumpToTimeRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\ntype jumpToTimeRequest struct {\n\t// TimestampMS is the target timestamp in epoch milliseconds.\n\tTimestampMS int64 `json:\"timestamp_ms\"`\n\t// WindowMS is the time window around the timestamp (default 5000ms).\n\tWindowMS int64 `json:\"window_ms,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// jumpToTime handles POST /api/replay/jump-to-time.\n// Creates a replay session centered on the given timestamp, seeks to it,\n// and sets it as the active session. Stops any previous active session first.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) jumpToTime(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req jumpToTimeRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"invalid request body: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif req.TimestampMS <= 0 {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, map[string]string{\"error\": \"timestamp_ms is required and must be positive\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\twindowMS := req.WindowMS\n\tif windowMS <= 0 {\n\t\twindowMS = 5000 // ±5 seconds default\n\t}\n\n\tfromMS := req.TimestampMS - windowMS\n\ttoMS := req.TimestampMS + windowMS\n\n\t// Stop previous active session if any\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tprevID := h.activeSessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif prevID != \"\" {\n\t\tif err := h.worker.StopSession(prevID); err == nil {\n\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tdelete(h.sessions, prevID)\n\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Previous replay session stopped: %s\", prevID)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Start new session\n\tsessionID, err := h.worker.StartSession(fromMS, toMS, 1)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{\"error\": \"failed to start session: \" + err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Seek to target timestamp\n\tif err := h.worker.Seek(sessionID, req.TimestampMS); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Jump-to-time seek failed: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Track in API layer\n\tsession := &_replaySession{\n\t\tID:        sessionID,\n\t\tFromMS:    fromMS,\n\t\tToMS:      toMS,\n\t\tCurrentMS: req.TimestampMS,\n\t\tSpeed:     1,\n\t\tState:     \"paused\",\n\t\tParams:    make(map[string]interface{}),\n\t\tCreatedAt: formatTimestamp(fromMS),\n\t}\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.sessions[sessionID] = session\n\th.activeSessionID = sessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Jump-to-time: session %s at %d (window ±%dms)\", sessionID, req.TimestampMS, windowMS)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"session_id\":   sessionID,\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": req.TimestampMS,\n\t\t\"from_ms\":      fromMS,\n\t\t\"to_ms\":        toMS,\n\t\t\"state\":        \"paused\",\n\t})\n}\n\n// applyLiveRequest represents the request body for POST /api/replay/apply-live.\ntype applyLiveRequest struct {\n\t// SessionID is the ID of the replay session to apply parameters from.\n\tSessionID string `json:\"session_id\"`\n}\n\n// applyLive handles POST /api/replay/apply-live.\n// Applies the current replay session's parameters to the live pipeline.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) applyLive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req err.Error()})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay parameters applied to live: session=%s\", req.SessionID)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"status\":  \"applied\",\n\t\t\"session\": req.SessionID,\n\t})\n}\n\n// Helper functions\nfunc timeNowMillis() int64 {\n\treturn time.Now().UnixNano() / 1e6\n}\n\nfunc parseISO8601(s string) (int64, error) {\n\tt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, s)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\treturn t.UnixNano() / 1e6, nil\n}\n\nfunc formatTimestamp(ms int64) string {\n\treturn time.Unix(ms/1000, timestamp.\n// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) SeekTo(targetMS int64) error {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tsessionID := h.activeSessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif sessionID == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn h.worker.Seek(sessionID, targetMS)\n}\n\n// Play starts playback of the active replay session at the specified speed.\n// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) Play(speed float64) error {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tsessionID := h.activeSessionID\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif sessionID == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"no active replay session\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert float speed to int (1x=1, 2x=2, 0.5x=1 for now)\n\tspeedInt := 1\n\tif speed >= 2.0 {\n\t\tspeedInt = 2\n\t} else if speed >= 5.0 {\n\t\tspeedInt = 5\n\t}\n\n\t// Set speed first\n\tif err := h.worker.SetPlaybackSpeed(sessionID, speedInt); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// Then set state to playing\n\treturn *params.NSubcarriers\n\t}\n\n\treturn h.worker.UpdateParams(sessionID, paramMap)\n}\n\n// ApplyToLive copies the current replay parameters to the live configuration.\n// Implements {\n\t\t\tupdates[\"n_subcarriers\"] = i\n\t\t} else if f, ok := val.(float64); ok {\n\t\t\tupdates[\"n_subcarriers\"] = int(f)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(updates) == 0 {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] ApplyToLive: Failed to persist parameters: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to persist parameters: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] ApplyToLive: Applied replay parameters to live: %+v\", updates)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// SetSpeed changes the playback speed of the active replay session.\n// Implements dashboard.ReplayHandler interface.\nfunc (h *ReplayHandler) SetSpeed(speed int\n\tspeedInt := 1\n\tif speed >= 2.0 {\n\t\tspeedInt = 2\n\t} else if speed >= 5.0 {\n\t\tspeedInt = 5\n\t}\n\n\treturn h.worker.SetPlaybackSpeed(sessionID, speedInt)\n}\n\n// SetActiveSession sets sync.Mutex\n\tpendingExplainBlobIDs map[int]bool\n}\n\n// snapshotCache holds serialised JSON bytes for each snapshot field,\n// allowing cheap byte-level comparison when computing deltas.\ntype snapshotCache struct {\n\tblobsJSON         []byte\n\tnodesJSON         []byte\n\tzonesJSON         []byte\n\tportalsJSON       []byte\n\tlinksJSON         []byte\n\tbleJSON for zones.\ntype ZoneOccupancySnapshot struct {\n\tCount   int    `json:\"count\"`\n\tBlobIDs []int  `json:\"blob_ids\"`\n}\n\n// IngestionState is an interface to query node/link/motion state from ingestion\ntype IngestionState interface {\n\tGetConnectedNodesInfo() []ingestion.NodeInfo\n\tGetAllLinksInfo() []ingestion.LinkInfo\n\tGetAllMotionStates() []ingestion.MotionStateItem\n}\n\n// BLEState is an interface to query current BLE devices for dashboard broadcast\ntype BLEState interface {\n\tGetCurrentDevices() []map[string]interface{}\n}\n\n// TriggerState is an interface to query automation trigger states for dashboard broadcast\ntype TriggerState interface {\n\tGetTriggerStates() []map[string]interface{}\n}\n\n// SystemHealthProvider is an interface to query system health metrics\ntype SystemHealthProvider interface {\n\tGetUptimeSeconds() int64\n\tGetNodeCount() int\n\tGetBeadCount() int\n\tGetGoRoutineCount() int\n\tGetMemoryMB() float64\n}\n\n// EventStore is an interface for persisting events to the database.\ntype EventStore interface {\n\tLogEvent(eventType string, timestamp time.Time, zone, person string, blobID int, detailJSON, severity string) error\n}\n\n// SecurityStateProvider provides security mode state for the dashboard snapshot.\ntype SecurityStateProvider interface {\n\tIsSecurityModeActive() bool\n\tGetSecurityMode() string\n\tGetLearningProgress() float64\n\tIsModelReady() bool\n}\n\n// SleepStateProvider provides sleep monitoring state for morning summary push.\ntype SleepStateProvider interface {\n\tShouldPushMorningSummary() (bool, map[string]interface{})\n}\n\n// BriefingProvider provides morning briefing functionality.\ntype BriefingProvider interface {\n\tGetTodayBriefing() (map[string]interface{}, error)\n\tMarkDelivered(id string) error\n\tShouldPushBriefing() bool\n}\n\n// ReplayHandler is the interface for replay engine operations.\ntype ReplayHandler interface {\n\tSeekTo(targetMS int64) error\n\tPlay(speed float64) error\n\tPause() error\n\tSetParams(params *replay.TunableParams) error\n\tApplyToLive() error\n\tSetSpeed(speed float64) error\n}\n\n// SetReplayHandler sets the replay handler for time-travel debugging.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetReplayHandler(handler ReplayHandler) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n\th.replayHandler = handler\n}\n\n// ZoneChangeBroadcaster notifies dashboard clients when zones or portals\n// are created, updated, or deleted via the REST API. Implementations should\n// both send an immediate typed broadcast and invalidate the snapshot cache\n// so the next delta tick doesn't send stale data.\ntype ZoneChangeBroadcaster interface {\n\tBroadcastZoneChange(action string, zone ZoneSnapshot)\n\tBroadcastPortalChange(action string, portal PortalSnapshot)\n}\n\n// Client represents a dashboard WebSocket client\ntype Client struct {\n\thub  *Hub\n\tsend chan []byte\n}\n\n// NewHub creates a new dashboard hub\nfunc NewHub() *Hub {\n\treturn &Hub{\n\t\tclients:               make(map[*Client]struct{}),\n\t\tbroadcast:             make(chan []byte, 256),\n\t\tregister:              make(chan *Client),\n\t\tunregister:            make(chan *Client),\n\t\tpendingExplainBlobIDs: make(map[int]bool),\n\t}\n}\n\n// RequestExplain records that a dashboard client wants an ExplainabilitySnapshot\n// for the given blobID. The snapshot will be broadcast on the next fusion tick.\nfunc (h *Hub) RequestExplain(blobID int) {\n\th.pendingExplainMu.Lock()\n\th.pendingExplainBlobIDs[blobID] = true\n\th.pendingExplainMu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// ConsumeExplainRequests returns and clears the set of blob IDs pending explain\n// snapshots. Called by the fusion loop each tick.\nfunc (h *Hub) ConsumeExplainRequests() []int {\n\th.pendingExplainMu.Lock()\n\tdefer h.pendingExplainMu.Unlock()\n\tif len(h.pendingExplainBlobIDs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tids := make([]int, 0, len(h.pendingExplainBlobIDs))\n\tfor id := range h.pendingExplainBlobIDs {\n\t\tids = append(ids, id)\n\t}\n\th.pendingExplainBlobIDs = make(map[int]bool)\n\treturn ids\n}\n\n// BroadcastExplainSnapshot broadcasts a \"blob_explain\" WebSocket message\n// containing the ExplainabilitySnapshot for a blob.\n//\n// The snapshot is serialised from the provided data map and broadcast to all\n// connected dashboard clients. The message format is:\n//\n//\t{\"type\":\"blob_explain\",\"blob_id\":N,\"snapshot\":{...}}\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastExplainSnapshot(blobID int, snapshot interface{}) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":     \"blob_explain\",\n\t\t\"blob_id\":  blobID,\n\t\t\"snapshot\": snapshot,\n\t}\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(msg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal blob_explain message: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// SetIngestionState sets the ingestion state provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetIngestionState(state IngestionState) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.ingestionState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetBLEState sets the BLE state provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetBLEState(state BLEState) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.bleState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetTriggerState sets the automation trigger state provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetTriggerState(state TriggerState) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.triggerState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetSystemHealth sets the system health provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetSystemHealth(provider SystemHealthProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.systemHealth = provider\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetEventStore sets the event persistence store\nfunc (h *Hub) SetEventStore(store EventStore) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.eventStore = store\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetZoneState sets the zone state provider for snapshot broadcasts.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetZoneState(state ZoneStateProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.zoneState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetSecurityState sets the security state provider for snapshot broadcasts.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetSecurityState(state SecurityStateProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.securityState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetSleepState sets the sleep state provider for morning summary push.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetSleepState(state SleepStateProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.sleepState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetBriefingProvider sets the briefing provider for morning briefing push.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetBriefingProvider(provider BriefingProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.briefingProvider = provider\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// Run starts the hub's main loop.\n// The 10 Hz delta tick replaces the old 5 s state / 500 ms presence broadcasts.\n// BLE scan results are broadcast every 5 s as a separate typed message.\n// System health (60 s) is kept as a separate low-frequency broadcast.\nfunc (h *Hub) Run() {\n\t// 10 Hz snapshot/delta tick\n\tdeltaTicker := time.NewTicker(100 * time.Millisecond)\n\tdefer deltaTicker.Stop()\n\n\t// System health broadcast ticker (60 seconds) — kept separate\n\thealthTicker := time.NewTicker(60 * time.Second)\n\tdefer healthTicker.Stop()\n\n\t// BLE scan broadcast ticker (5 seconds)\n\tbleScanTicker := time.NewTicker(5 * time.Second)\n\tdefer bleScanTicker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase client := <-h.register:\n\t\t\t// Build and send snapshot BEFORE adding the client to the\n\t\t\t// broadcast map so that no delta messages race ahead of the\n\t\t\t// initial state.\n\t\t\tsnap := h.buildSnapshot()\n\t\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(snap)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal snapshot: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\t\tcase client.send <- data:\n\t\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Snapshot dropped for new client (buffer full)\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\th.clients[client] = struct{}{}\n\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Dashboard client connected (total: %d)\", len(h.clients))\n\n\t\t\t// Push morning briefing on first connection after 6am\n\t\t\th.pushBriefingToClient(client)\n\n\t\tcase client := <-h.unregister:\n\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tif _, ok := h.clients[client]; ok {\n\t\t\t\tdelete(h.clients, client)\n\t\t\t\tclose(client.send)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Dashboard client disconnected (total: %d)\", len(h.clients))\n\n\t\tcase message := <-h.broadcast:\n\t\t\th.mu.RLock()\n\t\t\tfor client := range h.clients {\n\t\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\t\tcase client.send <- message:\n\t\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t\t// Client buffer full, skip\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\t\tcase <-deltaTicker.C:\n\t\t\th.tickDelta()\n\n\t\tcase <-healthTicker.C:\n\t\t\th.broadcastSystemHealth()\n\n\t\tcase <-bleScanTicker.C:\n\t\t\th.broadcastBLEScan()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// Register registers a new dashboard client\nfunc (h *Hub) Register(client *Client) {\n\th.register <- client\n}\n\n// Unregister unregisters a dashboard client\nfunc (h *Hub) Unregister(client *Client) {\n\th.unregister <- client\n}\n\n// Broadcast sends a message to all connected dashboard clients\nfunc (h *Hub) Broadcast(message []byte) {\n\tselect {\n\tcase h.broadcast <- message:\n\tdefault:\n\t\t// Channel full, drop message\n\t}\n}\n\n// BroadcastCSI broadcasts a CSI frame to all dashboard clients\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastCSI(nodeMAC, peerMAC string, data []byte) {\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastNodeConnected notifies dashboards of a new node\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastNodeConnected(mac, firmware, chip string, unpaired bool) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":             \"node_connected\",\n\t\t\"mac\":              mac,\n\t\t\"firmware_version\": firmware,\n\t\t\"chip\":             chip,\n\t\t\"unpaired\":         unpaired,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastNodeDisconnected notifies dashboards of a node leaving\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastNodeDisconnected(mac string) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\": \"node_disconnected\",\n\t\t\"mac\":  mac,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastLinkActive notifies dashboards of an active link\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLinkActive(linkID, nodeMAC, peerMAC string) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":     \"link_active\",\n\t\t\"id\":       linkID,\n\t\t\"node_mac\": nodeMAC,\n\t\t\"peer_mac\": peerMAC,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastLinkInactive notifies dashboards of an inactive link\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLinkInactive(linkID string) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\": \"link_inactive\",\n\t\t\"id\":   linkID,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastMotionState sends motion state for one or more links to all dashboard clients.\n// Called on state changes (idle↔motion) so the dashboard updates immediately.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastMotionState(states []ingestion.MotionStateItem) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":  \"motion_state\",\n\t\t\"links\": states,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// ─── Phase 3 Broadcasts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n// nodeJSON is the wire format for a fleet node sent to the dashboard.\ntype nodeJSON struct {\n\tMAC      string  `json:\"mac\"`\n\tName     string  `json:\"name\"`\n\tRole     string  `json:\"role\"`\n\tPosX     float64 `json:\"pos_x\"`\n\tPosY     float64 `json:\"pos_y\"`\n\tPosZ     float64 `json:\"pos_z\"`\n\tVirtual  bool    `json:\"virtual\"`\n\tLastSeen int64   `json:\"last_seen_ms\"`\n}\n\n// roomJSON is the wire format for room configuration.\ntype roomJSON struct {\n\tWidth   float64 `json:\"width\"`\n\tDepth   float64 `json:\"depth\"`\n\tHeight  float64 `json:\"height\"`\n\tOriginX float64 `json:\"origin_x\"`\n\tOriginZ float64 `json:\"origin_z\"`\n}\n\n// BroadcastRegistryState sends updated node registry and room config to all dashboard clients.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastRegistryState(nodes []fleet.NodeRecord, room fleet.RoomConfig) {\n\twireNodes := make([]nodeJSON, len(nodes))\n\tfor i, n := range nodes {\n\t\twireNodes[i] = nodeJSON{\n\t\t\tMAC:      n.MAC,\n\t\t\tName:     n.Name,\n\t\t\tRole:     n.Role,\n\t\t\tPosX:     n.PosX,\n\t\t\tPosY:     n.PosY,\n\t\t\tPosZ:     n.PosZ,\n\t\t\tVirtual:  n.Virtual,\n\t\t\tLastSeen: n.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":  \"registry_state\",\n\t\t\"nodes\": wireNodes,\n\t\t\"room\": roomJSON{\n\t\t\tWidth:   room.Width,\n\t\t\tDepth:   room.Depth,\n\t\t\tHeight:  room.Height,\n\t\t\tOriginX: room.OriginX,\n\t\t\tOriginZ: room.OriginZ,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// trailPoint is a compact [x, z] pair for JSON serialisation.\ntype trailPoint [2]float64\n\n// blobJSON is the wire format for a tracked person blob.\ntype blobJSON struct {\n\tID                 int          `json:\"id\"`\n\tX                  float64      `json:\"x\"`\n\tZ                  float64      `json:\"z\"`\n\tVX                 float64      `json:\"vx\"`\n\tVZ                 float64      `json:\"vz\"`\n\tWeight             float64      `json:\"weight\"`\n\tTrail              []trailPoint `json:\"trail\"`\n\tPosture            string       `json:\"posture,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonID           string       `json:\"person_id,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonLabel        string       `json:\"person_label,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonColor        string       `json:\"person_color,omitempty\"`\n\tIdentityConfidence float64      `json:\"identity_confidence,omitempty\"`\n\tIdentitySource     string       `json:\"identity_source,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// BroadcastLocUpdate sends localisation results to all dashboard clients.\n// It also stores the latest blob data for the snapshot/delta protocol.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLocUpdate(blobs []tracking.Blob) {\n\twireBlobs := make([]blobJSON, len(blobs))\n\tfor i, b := range blobs {\n\t\ttrail := make([]trailPoint, len(b.Trail))\n\t\tfor j, pt := range b.Trail {\n\t\t\ttrail[j] = trailPoint{pt[0], pt[1]}\n\t\t}\n\t\twireBlobs[i] = blobJSON{\n\t\t\tID:                 b.ID,\n\t\t\tX:                  b.X,\n\t\t\tZ:                  b.Z,\n\t\t\tVX:                 b.VX,\n\t\t\tVZ:                 b.VZ,\n\t\t\tWeight:             b.Weight,\n\t\t\tTrail:              trail,\n\t\t\tPosture:            string(b.Posture),\n\t\t\tPersonID:           b.PersonID,\n\t\t\tPersonLabel:        b.PersonLabel,\n\t\t\tPersonColor:        b.PersonColor,\n\t\t\tIdentityConfidence: b.IdentityConfidence,\n\t\t\tIdentitySource:     b.IdentitySource,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Store for snapshot protocol.\n\th.snapMu.Lock()\n\tif data, err := json.Marshal(wireBlobs); err == nil {\n\t\th.snap.blobsJSON = data\n\t}\n\th.snapMu.Unlock()\n\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":  \"loc_update\",\n\t\t\"blobs\": wireBlobs,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastCoverageMap sends the GDOP coverage map to all dashboard clients.\n// data is a row-major float32 array of GDOP values, cols × rows cells.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastCoverageMap(data []float32, cols, rows int, cellSize float64, originX, originZ float64) {\n\t// Encode as a compact flat array of float32 values (JSON).\n\tvals := make([]float64, len(data))\n\tfor i, v := range data {\n\t\tvals[i] = float64(v)\n\t}\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":      \"coverage_map\",\n\t\t\"cols\":      cols,\n\t\t\"rows\":      rows,\n\t\t\"cell_size\": cellSize,\n\t\t\"origin_x\":  originX,\n\t\t\"origin_z\":  originZ,\n\t\t\"data\":      vals,\n\t}\n\tencoded, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(encoded)\n}\n\nfunc (h *Hub) sendInitialState(client *Client) {\n\t// Legacy path kept for tests that call sendInitialState directly.\n\t// The Run() loop now handles snapshot delivery on register.\n\tsnap := h.buildSnapshot()\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(snap)\n\tselect {\n\tcase client.send <- data:\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n}\n\n// buildSnapshot constructs the full snapshot message for a new client connection.\nfunc (h *Hub) buildSnapshot() map[string]interface{} {\n\tnow := time.Now().UnixMilli()\n\tsnap := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":         \"snapshot\",\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": now,\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\ting := h.ingestionState\n\tble := h.bleState\n\ttrig := h.triggerState\n\tzones := h.zoneState\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif ing != nil {\n\t\tif nodes := ing.GetConnectedNodesInfo(); len(nodes) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"nodes\"] = nodes\n\t\t}\n\t\tif links := ing.GetAllLinksInfo(); len(links) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"links\"] = links\n\t\t}\n\t\tif motionStates := ing.GetAllMotionStates(); len(motionStates) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"motion_states\"] = motionStates\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif ble != nil {\n\t\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"ble_devices\"] = devices\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif trig != nil {\n\t\tif triggers := trig.GetTriggerStates(); len(triggers) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"triggers\"] = triggers\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif zones != nil {\n\t\tsnap[\"zones\"] = h.buildZoneSnapshots(zones)\n\t\tif portals := zones.GetAllPortals(); len(portals) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"portals\"] = portals\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Include latest blobs from the snapshot cache.\n\th.snapMu.RLock()\n\tif len(h.snap.blobsJSON) > 0 {\n\t\tvar blobs []blobJSON\n\t\tif json.Unmarshal(h.snap.blobsJSON, &blobs) == nil {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"blobs\"] = blobs\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\th.snapMu.RUnlock()\n\n\treturn snap\n}\n\n// buildZoneSnapshots converts zone state into the wire format for the snapshot.\nfunc (h *Hub) buildZoneSnapshots(zp ZoneStateProvider) []ZoneSnapshot {\n\tzones := zp.GetAllZones()\n\toccupancy := zp.GetOccupancy()\n\tstatusMap := zp.GetOccupancyStatus()\n\tresult := make([]ZoneSnapshot, 0, len(zones))\n\tfor _, z := range zones {\n\t\tocc, ok := occupancy[z.ID]\n\t\tpeople := make([]string, 0)\n\t\tif ok {\n\t\t\t_ = occ.BlobIDs\n\t\t}\n\t\toccStatus := statusMap[z.ID]\n\t\tsnap := ZoneSnapshot{\n\t\t\tID:     z.ID,\n\t\t\tName:   z.Name,\n\t\t\tCount:  occ.Count,\n\t\t\tPeople: people,\n\t\t\tMinX:   z.MinX,\n\t\t\tMinY:   z.MinY,\n\t\t\tMinZ:   z.MinZ,\n\t\t\tSizeX:  z.SizeX,\n\t\t\tSizeY:  z.SizeY,\n\t\t\tSizeZ:  z.SizeZ,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif occStatus == \"uncertain\" {\n\t\t\tsnap.OccStatus = \"uncertain\"\n\t\t}\n\t\tresult = append(result, snap)\n\t}\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// tickDelta is called every 100 ms (10 Hz). It computes which snapshot\n// fields changed since the last tick and broadcasts only those fields.\n// Delta messages omit the \"type\" field so the frontend can distinguish\n// them from event-driven messages.\nfunc (h *Hub) tickDelta() {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif clientCount == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now().UnixMilli()\n\tdelta := make(map[string]interface{})\n\tdelta[\"timestamp_ms\"] = now\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\ting := h.ingestionState\n\tble := h.bleState\n\ttrig := h.triggerState\n\tzones := h.zoneState\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\t// --- blobs (stored by BroadcastLocUpdate) ---\n\th.snapMu.Lock()\n\tif ing != nil {\n\t\tif nodes := ing.GetConnectedNodesInfo(); len(nodes) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(nodes); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.nodesJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"nodes\"] = nodes\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.nodesJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif len(h.snap.nodesJSON) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"nodes\"] = []ingestion.NodeInfo{}\n\t\t\t\th.snap.nodesJSON = nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif links := ing.GetAllLinksInfo(); len(links) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(links); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.linksJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"links\"] = links\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.linksJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif len(h.snap.linksJSON) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"links\"] = []ingestion.LinkInfo{}\n\t\t\t\th.snap.linksJSON = nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif motionStates := ing.GetAllMotionStates(); len(motionStates) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(motionStates); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.motionStatesJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"motion_states\"] = motionStates\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.motionStatesJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(h.snap.blobsJSON) > 0 {\n\t\tdelta[\"blobs\"] = json.RawMessage(h.snap.blobsJSON)\n\t}\n\n\tif ble != nil {\n\t\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(devices); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.bleJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"ble_devices\"] = devices\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.bleJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif trig != nil {\n\t\tif triggers := trig.GetTriggerStates(); len(triggers) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(triggers); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.triggersJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"triggers\"] = triggers\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.triggersJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif zones != nil {\n\t\tzs := h.buildZoneSnapshots(zones)\n\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(zs); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.zonesJSON) {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"zones\"] = zs\n\t\t\t\th.snap.zonesJSON = data\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tps := zones.GetAllPortals()\n\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(ps); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.portalsJSON) {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"portals\"] = ps\n\t\t\t\th.snap.portalsJSON = data\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\th.snap.timestampMs = now\n\th.snapMu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Include any pending events that arrived since the last tick.\n\th.pendingEventsMu.Lock()\n\tif len(h.pendingEvents) > 0 {\n\t\tdelta[\"events\"] = h.pendingEvents\n\t\th.pendingEvents = nil\n\t}\n\th.pendingEventsMu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Only broadcast if something actually changed (beyond timestamp).\n\tif len(delta) <= 1 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(delta)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal delta: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// bytesEqual compares two byte slices. Nil and empty are treated as equal.\nfunc bytesEqual(a, b []byte) bool {\n\tif len(a) == 0 && len(b) == 0 {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif len(a) != len(b) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tfor i := range a {\n\t\tif a[i] != b[i] {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// ClientCount returns the number of connected dashboard clients\nfunc (h *Hub) ClientCount() int {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn len(h.clients)\n}\n\n// broadcastSystemHealth broadcasts system health stats to all dashboard clients.\nfunc (h *Hub) broadcastSystemHealth() {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tprovider := h.systemHealth\n\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif provider == nil || clientCount == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\th.BroadcastSystemHealth(\n\t\tprovider.GetUptimeSeconds(),\n\t\tprovider.GetNodeCount(),\n\t\tprovider.GetBeadCount(),\n\t\tprovider.GetGoRoutineCount(),\n\t\tprovider.GetMemoryMB(),\n\t)\n}\n\n// broadcastBLEScan broadcasts the current BLE device list to all dashboard clients.\n// Called every 5 seconds when devices are present.\nfunc (h *Hub) broadcastBLEScan() {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tble := h.bleState\n\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif ble == nil || clientCount == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n\t\th.BroadcastBLEScan(devices)\n\t}\n}\n\n// BroadcastFleetChange broadcasts a fleet change event to all dashboard clients.\n// This implements the fleet.FleetChangeBroadcaster interface.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastFleetChange(event fleet.FleetChangeEvent) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":              \"fleet_change\",\n\t\t\"timestamp\":         event.Timestamp.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\"trigger_reason\":    event.TriggerReason,\n\t\t\"mean_gdop_before\":  event.MeanGDOPBefore,\n\t\t\"mean_gdop_after\":   event.MeanGDOPAfter,\n\t\t\"coverage_before\":   event.CoverageBefore,\n\t\t\"coverage_after\":    event.CoverageAfter,\n\t\t\"coverage_delta\":    event.CoverageDelta,\n\t\t\"is_degradation\":    event.IsDegradation,\n\t\t\"role_assignments\":  event.RoleAssignments,\n\t}\n\n\tif event.OfflineMAC != \"\" {\n\t\tmsg[\"offline_mac\"] = event.OfflineMAC\n\t}\n\tif event.RecoveredMAC != \"\" {\n\t\tmsg[\"recovered_mac\"] = event.RecoveredMAC\n\t}\n\tif event.WarningMessage != \"\" {\n\t\tmsg[\"warning_message\"] = event.WarningMessage\n\t}\n\tif len(event.GDOPBefore) > 0 {\n\t\tmsg[\"gdop_before\"] = floatsToSlice(event.GDOPBefore)\n\t\tmsg[\"gdop_after\"] = floatsToSlice(event.GDOPAfter)\n\t\tmsg[\"gdop_cols\"] = event.GDOPCols\n\t\tmsg[\"gdop_rows\"] = event.GDOPRows\n\t}\n\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// floatsToSlice converts []float32 to []float64 for JSON marshalling\nfunc floatsToSlice(f []float32) []float64 {\n\tresult := make([]float64, len(f))\n\tfor i, v := range f {\n\t\tresult[i] = float64(v)\n\t}\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// BroadcastFleetHealth broadcasts current fleet health status.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastFleetHealth(nodes []fleet.NodeRecord, roles map[string]string, coverageScore float64) {\n\ttype nodeHealth struct {\n\t\tMAC         string  `json:\"mac\"`\n\t\tName        string  `json:\"name\"`\n\t\tRole        string  `json:\"role\"`\n\t\tHealthScore float64 `json:\"health_score\"`\n\t\tOnline      bool    `json:\"online\"`\n\t}\n\n\twireNodes := make([]nodeHealth, len(nodes))\n\tfor i, n := range nodes {\n\t\trole := n.Role\n\t\tif r, ok := roles[n.MAC]; ok {\n\t\t\trole = r\n\t\t}\n\t\twireNodes[i] = nodeHealth{\n\t\t\tMAC:         n.MAC,\n\t\t\tName:        n.Name,\n\t\t\tRole:        role,\n\t\t\tHealthScore: n.HealthScore,\n\t\t\tOnline:      n.LastSeenAt.After(time.Now().Add(-5 * time.Minute)),\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":           \"fleet_health\",\n\t\t\"nodes\":          wireNodes,\n\t\t\"coverage_score\": coverageScore,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastFleetHistory broadcasts optimisation history to dashboard.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastFleetHistory(history []fleet.OptimisationHistoryRecord) {\n\ttype historyEntry struct {\n\t\tID              int64   `json:\"id\"`\n\t\tTimestamp       int64   `json:\"timestamp_ms\"`\n\t\tTriggerReason   string  `json:\"trigger_reason\"`\n\t\tMeanGDOPBefore  float64 `json:\"mean_gdop_before\"`\n\t\tMeanGDOPAfter   float64 `json:\"mean_gdop_after\"`\n\t\tCoverageDelta   float64 `json:\"coverage_delta\"`\n\t}\n\n\twireHistory := make([]historyEntry, len(history))\n\tfor i, rec := range history {\n\t\twireHistory[i] = historyEntry{\n\t\t\tID:             rec.ID,\n\t\t\tTimestamp:      rec.Timestamp.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\tTriggerReason:  rec.TriggerReason,\n\t\t\tMeanGDOPBefore: rec.MeanGDOPBefore,\n\t\t\tMeanGDOPAfter:  rec.MeanGDOPAfter,\n\t\t\tCoverageDelta:  rec.CoverageDelta,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":    \"fleet_history\",\n\t\t\"history\": wireHistory,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// FleetChangeEvent is re-exported for compatibility\ntype FleetChangeEvent = fleet.FleetChangeEvent\n\n// BroadcastSystemModeChange broadcasts a system mode change event to all dashboard clients.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastSystemModeChange(event interface{}) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\": \"system_mode_change\",\n\t\t\"data\": event,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastAnomaly broadcasts an anomaly detection event to all dashboard clients.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastAnomaly(anomaly interface{}) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\": \"anomaly_detected\",\n\t\t\"data\": anomaly,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastEvent broadcasts an event (presence transition, zone entry/exit, portal crossing) to all dashboard clients.\n// It also persists the event to the database and buffers it for inclusion in the next incremental update.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastEvent(eventID string, timestamp time.Time, kind, zone string, blobID int, personName string) {\n\tevt := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"id\":          eventID,\n\t\t\"ts\":          timestamp.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\"kind\":        kind,\n\t\t\"zone\":        zone,\n\t\t\"blob_id\":     blobID,\n\t\t\"person_name\": personName,\n\t}\n\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":  \"event\",\n\t\t\"event\": evt,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n\n\t// Buffer for inclusion in the next incremental update.\n\th.pendingEventsMu.Lock()\n\th.pendingEvents = append(h.pendingEvents, evt)\n\t// Keep buffer bounded to prevent unbounded growth.\n\tif len(h.pendingEvents) > 100 {\n\t\th.pendingEvents = h.pendingEvents[len(h.pendingEvents)-50:]\n\t}\n\th.pendingEventsMu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Persist to database if store is configured.\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tstore := h.eventStore\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif store != nil {\n\t\tgo func() {\n\t\t\tif err := store.LogEvent(kind, timestamp, zone, personName, blobID, \"\", \"info\"); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to persist event %s: %v\", eventID, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}()\n\t}\n}\n\n// BroadcastAlert broadcasts an alert (anomaly detection, security mode trigger) to all dashboard clients.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastAlert(alertID string, Package dashboard handles WebSocket connections from dashboard clients\n// and broadcasts CSI data from the ingestion server.\npackage dashboard\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"log\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/spaxel/mothership/internal/fleet\"\n\t\"github.com/spaxel/mothership/internal/ingestion\"\n\t\"github.com/spaxel/mothership/internal/replay\"\n\t\"github.com/spaxel/mothership/internal/tracking\"\n)\n\n// Hub manages all dashboard client connections and broadcasts\ntype Hub struct {\n\tmu         sync.RWMutex\n\tclients    map[*Client]struct{}\n\tbroadcast  chan []byte\n\tregister   chan *Client\n\tunregister chan *Client\n\n\t// Reference to ingestion server for state queries\n\tingestionState IngestionState\n\n\t// Additional state providers\n\tbleState        BLEState\n\ttriggerState    TriggerState\n\tsystemHealth    SystemHealthProvider\n\tzoneState       ZoneStateProvider\n\teventStore      EventStore\n\tsecurityState   SecurityStateProvider\n\tsleepState      SleepStateProvider\n\tbriefingProvider BriefingProvider\n\n\t// Pending events buffer — events accumulated between 10 Hz delta ticks.\n\tpendingEvents   []map[string]interface{}\n\tpendingEventsMu sync.Mutex\n\n\t// Snapshot protocol: stores the last full snapshot for delta computation.\n\t// Updated on every 10 Hz tick.\n\tsnapMu sync.RWMutex\n\tsnap   snapshotCache\n\n\t// Replay handler for time-travel debugging\n\treplayHandler ReplayHandler\n\n\t// pendingExplainBlobIDs holds blob IDs for which dashboard clients have\n\t// requested an ExplainabilitySnapshot via \"request_explain\" WebSocket messages.\n\t// The fusion loop checks this and generates the snapshot on the next tick.\n\tpendingExplainMu      sync.Mutex\n\tpendingExplainBlobIDs map[int]bool\n}\n\n// snapshotCache holds serialised JSON bytes for each snapshot field,\n// allowing cheap byte-level comparison when computing deltas.\ntype snapshotCache struct {\n\tblobsJSON         []byte\n\tnodesJSON         []byte\n\tzonesJSON         []byte\n\tportalsJSON       []byte\n\tlinksJSON         []byte\n\tbleJSON           []byte\n\ttriggersJSON      []byte\n\tmotionStatesJSON  []byte\n\tsecurityJSON      []byte\n\tconfidence        int\n\ttimestampMs       int64\n}\n\n// ZoneStateProvider is an interface to query zone data for the dashboard snapshot.\ntype ZoneStateProvider interface {\n\tGetAllZones() []ZoneSnapshot\n\tGetAllPortals() []PortalSnapshot\n\tGetOccupancy() map[string]ZoneOccupancySnapshot\n\tGetOccupancyStatus() map[string]string\n}\n\n// PortalSnapshot is the wire format for a portal in the dashboard snapshot.\ntype PortalSnapshot struct {\n\tID        string  `json:\"id\"`\n\tName      string  `json:\"name\"`\n\tZoneA     string  `json:\"zone_a\"`\n\tZoneB     string  `json:\"zone_b\"`\n\tP1X       float64 `json:\"p1_x\"`\n\tP1Y       float64
